what: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
text: function downloads (already cached) loads processed single-cell RNA-seq example datasets Zenodo-backed registry. current registry contains PBMC example datasets (pbmc1k, pbmc3k, pbmc4k, pbmc8k), interface intentionally generalized additional example datasets can added later without introducing another top-level loader function.

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
code: sn_load_data(   dataset = "pbmc3k",   sample_id = NULL,   matrix_type = c("filtered", "raw", "metrics"),   save_dir = "~/.shennong/data",   return_object = TRUE,   species = NULL,   token = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   quiet = FALSE,   record_id = NULL,   validate = FALSE,   backend = c("auto", "local", "api"),   server_url = getOption("ShennongData.server_url", getOption("shennong.data.server_url",     "http://127.0.0.1:18000")),   lazy = TRUE,   api_args = list() )

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
text: dataset Character vector. dataset(s) load. Legacy example values include "pbmc1k", "pbmc3k", "pbmc4k", "pbmc8k". Public Shennong collection values sample IDs returned sn_list_datasets(), study IDs sample_id also supplied. Default: "pbmc3k". sample_id Optional sample ID(s) public Shennong collection records. Use dataset names study ID "AndrewDHildreth2021". dataset already names sample IDs, leave NULL. matrix_type Character scalar. matrix type load. One : "filtered": filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 (Cell Ranger filtered barcodes). "raw": raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5 (unfiltered barcodes; useful ambient RNA correction tools SoupX). "metrics": Cell Ranger metrics_summary.csv public Shennong collection samples. Default: "filtered". save_dir Character scalar. Local cache directory downloaded Zenodo files stored. directory created exist. Default: "~/.shennong/data". return_object Logical. TRUE (default), function returns -memory object. FALSE, function ensures file downloaded locally returns (invisibly) local file path. species Character scalar. Species label passed sn_initialize_seurat_object() constructing Seurat objects (.e. matrix_type == "filtered"). Ignored matrix_type == "raw". NULL, use dataset default example-data registry. loading multiple datasets, supply either one species label datasets one label per dataset. token Optional Zenodo access token. Public example datasets require token. Supply restricted/private records. overwrite Logical. TRUE, re-download cached files. quiet Logical. TRUE, suppress Zenodo download progress messages. record_id Zenodo record ID public Shennong collection samples. Defaults option shennong.public_data_record "20044788". validate Logical; TRUE, validate extracted public collection files manifest.tsv MD5 checksums. backend Character scalar. "auto" uses Shennong Data Server requested single dataset present server catalog falls back legacy local/Zenodo loading otherwise. "api" forces server-backed lazy client. "local" forces legacy loading. server_url Shennong Data Server URL used backend resolves "api". lazy Logical. API-backed datasets, return lazy remote table without downloading data. Set FALSE also passing materialization arguments api_args. api_args Named list controlling ShennongData client. Supported entries connection, connect_args, version, view, validate, refresh, assay, layer, collect_args. lazy = FALSE, collect_args forwarded ShennongData::collect().

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
text: One : backend = "api": lazy ShennongData resource handle, collected result lazy = FALSE. matrix_type == "filtered" return_object = TRUE: Seurat object. Multiple datasets returned one merged Seurat object. matrix_type == "raw" return_object = TRUE: sparse count matrix (e.g. dgCMatrix) , multiple datasets, named list sparse count matrices. return_object = FALSE: local file path cached .h5 file, named character vector paths multiple datasets, returned invisibly.

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
text: Instead storing serialized R objects, function caches original Zenodo .h5 files locally reproducibility version consistency. requested, dynamically constructs returns either: Seurat object (filtered data), sparse count matrix (raw data). Users can also choose download/cache data without loading memory. datasets re-aligned using Cell Ranger v9.0.1 custom reference based GENCODE v48 (GRCh38.p14). Caching strategy function caches original files Zenodo first use: example, loading pbmc3k may see: return_object = TRUE, cached .h5 file read fly: matrix_type == "filtered": Seurat object constructed via sn_initialize_seurat_object(). multiple datasets requested, per-dataset Seurat objects merged source recorded sample metadata column. matrix_type == "raw": function returns sparse count matrix (typically dgCMatrix), suitable ambient RNA estimation / SoupX workflows. multiple raw datasets requested, matrices returned named list. return_object = FALSE, object constructed; file ensured exist locally. Multiple datasets return named character vector cached paths.
code: {dataset}_{matrix_type}_feature_bc_matrix.h5 ~/.shennong/data/ |- pbmc1k_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc1k_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc3k_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc3k_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc4k_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc4k_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5 |- pbmc8k_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 \- pbmc8k_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
text: Duan S. (2025). Processed PBMC datasets re-aligned Cell Ranger v9.0.1 (GENCODE v48, GRCh38.p14). Zenodo. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.14884845

title: Load example datasets from Zenodo — sn_load_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # 1. Load filtered PBMC3k as a Seurat object: pbmc <- sn_load_data()  # 2. Load raw PBMC3k counts as a sparse matrix (for SoupX etc.): pbmc_raw <- sn_load_data(matrix_type = "raw")  # 3. Only download/cache PBMC8k, don't construct anything in-memory: sn_load_data(dataset = "pbmc8k", return_object = FALSE)  # 4. Load and merge multiple filtered PBMC examples: pbmc_merged <- sn_load_data(dataset = c("pbmc1k", "pbmc3k"))  # 5. Use a custom cache directory: pbmc4k <- sn_load_data(   dataset  = "pbmc4k",   save_dir = "~/datasets/pbmc_cache" )  # 6. Load a sample from the Shennong public Zenodo collection: data_index <- sn_list_datasets() sample_obj <- sn_load_data(dataset = data_index$dataset[[1]])  # 7. Open a lazy Shennong Data Server resource: remote <- sn_load_data("toil", backend = "api") } # }

title: Normalize data in a Seurat object — sn_normalize_data

text: function creates dimensionality reduction plot categorical data using Seurat ggplot2. allows selection reduction method, grouping, splitting variables, well visualization labels, rasterization, color palette. sn_plot_dim() function intended used wrapper around Seurat's DimPlot() function.

title: Create a dimensionality reduction plot for categorical data — sn_plot_dim
code: sn_plot_dim(   object,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   cols = NULL,   pt_size = NULL,   reduction = NULL,   group_by = NULL,   split_by = NULL,   shape_by = NULL,   order = NULL,   shuffle = FALSE,   seed = 717,   label = FALSE,   label_size = 8 * 0.36,   label_color = "black",   label_box = FALSE,   label_halo = TRUE,   repel = FALSE,   cells_highlight = NULL,   cols_highlight = "#DE2D26",   sizes_highlight = 1,   na_value = "grey50",   ncol = NULL,   combine = TRUE,   raster = TRUE,   raster_dpi = c(512, 512),   show_legend = TRUE,   show_axis = FALSE,   show_border = TRUE,   title = NULL,   palette = "Paired",   aspect_ratio = 1,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL,   ... )

title: Create a dimensionality reduction plot for categorical data — sn_plot_dim
text: object Seurat object containing categorical data. dims dimensions plot. Default c(1, 2). cells cells plot. Default NULL. cols columns plot. Default NULL. pt_size size points plot. NULL, Shennong chooses value automatically based number cells. reduction dimensionality reduction method. Default NULL. group_by variable group data . Default NULL. split_by variable split data . Default NULL. shape_by variable shape data . Default NULL. order order plot data . Default NULL. shuffle Logical value indicating whether shuffle data plotting. Default FALSE. seed random seed use shuffling data. Default 1. label Logical value indicating whether show labels plot. Default FALSE. label_size size labels plot. Default 8 * 0.36. label_color color labels plot. Default "black". label_box Logical value indicating whether show box around labels plot. Default FALSE. label_halo Logical value indicating whether Shennong add white halo/background behind text labels. Set FALSE keep Seurat's native label layer unchanged. repel Logical value indicating whether use point repulsion avoid overlapping labels. Default TRUE. cells_highlight cells highlight plot. Default NULL. cols_highlight columns highlight plot. Default NULL. sizes_highlight sizes highlight plot. Default NULL. na_value value use missing data. Default "grey50". ncol number columns use plot. Default NULL. combine Logical value indicating whether combine plots single plot. Default TRUE. raster Logical value indicating whether use rasterization improved performance. Default TRUE. raster_dpi DPI use rasterization. Default c(512, 512). show_legend Logical value indicating whether show legend plot. Default TRUE. show_axis Logical value indicating whether show axis plot. Default FALSE. show_border Logical value indicating whether show panel axis borders plot. Default TRUE. title title plot. Default NULL. palette color palette use plot. Default "Paired". aspect_ratio Optional panel aspect ratio. Defaults 1. used together panel_widths panel_heights, Shennong derives missing panel dimension automatically. panel_widths, panel_heights Optional panel size arguments forwarded catplot::theme_cat() available. ... Additional parameters passed DimPlot() function Seurat.

title: Create a dimensionality reduction plot for categorical data — sn_plot_dim
text: ggplot2 object containing dimensionality reduction plot.

title: Plot feature expression in reduced dimensions — sn_plot_feature
text: function plots feature expression reduced dimensions using FeaturePlot function Seurat package.

title: Plot feature expression in reduced dimensions — sn_plot_feature
code: sn_plot_feature(   object,   features,   reduction = NULL,   assay = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   label = FALSE,   split_by = NULL,   label_size = 8 * 0.36,   pt_size = NULL,   alpha = 1,   stroke_size = NULL,   layer = "data",   min_cutoff = NA,   max_cutoff = NA,   shape_by = NULL,   blend = FALSE,   blend_threshold = 0.5,   ncol = NULL,   coord_fixed = FALSE,   by_col = TRUE,   mode = c("expression", "density"),   density_method = c("wkde", "ks"),   density_adjust = 1,   density_style = c("galaxy", "plain"),   raster = TRUE,   raster_dpi = c(512, 512),   seed = 717,   title = NULL,   legend_title = NULL,   show_legend = TRUE,   show_axis = FALSE,   show_border = TRUE,   palette = "YlOrRd",   direction = 1,   legend_labels = c("text", "numeric"),   keep_scale = c("all", "feature", "none"),   collect_legend = TRUE,   aspect_ratio = 1,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL,   x_label = NULL,   y_label = NULL,   ... )

title: Plot feature expression in reduced dimensions — sn_plot_feature
text: object Seurat object containing data plot. features character vector feature names plot. reduction character string specifying dimensionality reduction use (e.g., "PCA", "UMAP", "tSNE"). Defaults NULL. assay Optional assay passed Seurat's FeaturePlot() used density-mode expression retrieval. dims Two dimensions plot. Defaults c(1, 2). cells Optional cells include. label character vector specifying labels use cell group. Defaults label. split_by character vector specifying cell groups split plot . Defaults NULL. label_size numeric value specifying size labels. Defaults 8 * 0.36. pt_size numeric value specifying size points. NULL, Shennong chooses value automatically based number cells. alpha Point alpha passed Seurat's FeaturePlot(). stroke_size Point stroke size passed Seurat's FeaturePlot(). layer character string specifying layer Seurat object use (example, "data" "scale.data"). Defaults "data". min_cutoff numeric value specifying minimum expression cutoff. Defaults NA. max_cutoff numeric value specifying maximum expression cutoff. Defaults NA. shape_by, blend, blend_threshold, ncol, coord_fixed, by_col, raster_dpi Snake-case wrappers corresponding Seurat FeaturePlot() arguments. mode One "expression" "density". Density mode computes Nebulosa-style weighted feature density selected embedding renders galaxy-like theme default. density_method Density estimator used mode = "density". One "wkde" "ks". Defaults "wkde". density_adjust Bandwidth adjustment forwarded density estimator mode = "density". Larger values smooth . density_style One "galaxy" "plain". Defaults "galaxy". raster logical value specifying whether use raster graphics. Defaults TRUE. ggrastr installed, Shennong rasterizes regular ggplot point layer plotting pt_size keeps behavior raster = FALSE; otherwise falls back Seurat's native raster backend. seed integer value specifying random seed. Defaults 717. title character string specifying plot title. Defaults NULL. legend_title character string specifying legend title. Defaults NULL. show_legend logical value specifying whether show legend. Defaults TRUE. show_axis logical value specifying whether show plot axis. Defaults FALSE. show_border logical value specifying whether show plot border. Defaults TRUE. palette character string specifying color palette use. Defaults "YlOrRd". direction numeric value specifying direction color palette. Defaults 1. legend_labels One "text" show "Min" / "Max" colorbar ends "numeric" show numeric break labels. Defaults "text". keep_scale Passed Seurat's FeaturePlot(keep.scale = ...). Defaults "" multi-feature plots share one comparable color scale can collect single legend. collect_legend Logical; TRUE, collect shared legend patchwork multi-feature plots. Defaults TRUE. aspect_ratio Optional panel aspect ratio. Defaults 1. used together panel_widths panel_heights, Shennong derives missing panel dimension automatically. panel_widths, panel_heights Optional panel size arguments forwarded catplot::theme_cat() available. x_label, y_label Optional axis labels. ... Additional parameters pass FeaturePlot.

title: Plot feature expression in reduced dimensions — sn_plot_feature
text: ggplot2 object.

title: Plot a heatmap for selected genes or features — sn_plot_heatmap
code: sn_plot_heatmap(   object,   features,   group_by = "ident",   split_by = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "scale.data",   mode = c("cells", "average"),   scale_data = TRUE,   max_cells = NULL,   seed = 717,   palette = "RdBu",   direction = -1,   disp_min = -2.5,   disp_max = NULL,   col_min = -2.5,   col_max = 2.5,   average_fun = c("mean", "median"),   average_scale = TRUE,   group_bar = TRUE,   label = TRUE,   raster = TRUE,   label_size = 8,   label_angle = 45,   group_palette = "Paired",   group_colors = NULL,   show_cell_names = FALSE,   show_ticks = FALSE,   show_legend = TRUE,   title = NULL,   collect_legend = TRUE,   aspect_ratio = NULL,   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL,   ... )

title: Plot a heatmap for selected genes or features — sn_plot_heatmap
text: object Seurat object. features Character vector genes features display. group_by Metadata column used order label cells. Use NULL, "", "ident" current Seurat identities. split_by Optional metadata column. supplied, one heatmap drawn split level combined patchwork. assay Assay used expression retrieval. layer Data layer used expression retrieval. Defaults "scale.data" cell-level heatmaps. mode = "average", use "data" average normalized expression optional feature-wise scaling. mode One "cells" "average". "cells" displays cells; "average" averages expression group_by optional split_by. scale_data TRUE layer = "scale.data", scale requested features missing scaled layer. Used mode = "cells". max_cells Optional maximum number cells show per cell-level heatmap panel. seed Optional seed used max_cells downsamples cells. palette Continuous color palette name vector. direction Palette direction. disp_min, disp_max Display limits passed Seurat::DoHeatmap(). col_min, col_max Display limits mode = "average". average_fun Summary used mode = "average". average_scale Whether feature-wise z-score average expression mode = "average". group_bar, label, raster Passed Seurat::DoHeatmap() mode = "cells". Rasterization enabled default. label_size, label_angle Size points rotation angle cell-level group labels drawn heatmap. group_palette, group_colors Palette explicit colors cell-level group label bar. Defaults "Paired". show_cell_names, show_ticks Whether show cell-level x-axis labels axis ticks mode = "cells". default FALSE. show_legend Whether keep heatmap legend. title Optional plot title. split_by supplied, split levels used panel titles unless title also supplied. collect_legend Whether collect patchwork legends split plots. aspect_ratio, panel_widths, panel_heights Optional sizing controls forwarded Shennong/catplot theme helper. ... Additional arguments passed Seurat::DoHeatmap().

code: sn_prepare_annotation_evidence(   object,   de_name = NULL,   cluster_by = NULL,   n_markers = 10,   marker_selection = c("specific", "top"),   enrichment_name = NULL,   n_terms = 5,   enrichment_selection = c("specific", "top"),   include_qc = TRUE,   reduction = "umap",   n_neighbor_clusters = 3 )

title: Prepare cluster-annotation evidence from a Seurat object — sn_prepare_annotation_evidence
text: object Seurat object. de_name Optional stored marker-result name object@misc$de_results. omitted, Shennong prefers "default", single available result, otherwise recent marker result. cluster_by Metadata column containing cluster labels. n_markers Number top markers retain per cluster. marker_selection choose marker genes annotation evidence: "specific" prefers genes relatively unique one cluster, "top" keeps raw top-ranked genes. enrichment_name Optional stored enrichment result used add cluster-level functional evidence annotation prompt. n_terms Number enrichment terms retain per cluster enrichment_name supplied. enrichment_selection choose pathway/function terms annotation evidence: "specific" prefers terms concentrated fewer clusters, "top" keeps raw top-ranked terms. include_qc Logical; whether attach cluster-level QC summaries mitochondrial burden, failed-QC fractions, doublet fractions available metadata. reduction Optional dimensional reduction name used summarize cluster neighborhood geometry, example "umap". Use NULL disable geometry evidence. n_neighbor_clusters Number nearest clusters report reduction centroid distances. Canonical lineage heuristic hints derived known marker programs included automatically required genes present.

title: Prepare cluster-annotation evidence from a Seurat object — sn_prepare_annotation_evidence
text: structured list ready prompt construction.

title: Prepare cluster-annotation evidence from a Seurat object — sn_prepare_annotation_evidence
code: if (requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)) {   counts <- matrix(rpois(20 * 24, lambda = 1), nrow = 20, ncol = 24)   rownames(counts) <- c(     paste0("GENE", 1:14),     "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC", "MS4A1", "CD79A", "HLA-DRA"   )   colnames(counts) <- paste0("cell", 1:24)   counts[c("CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC"), 1:12] <-     counts[c("CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC"), 1:12] + 20   counts[c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "HLA-DRA"), 13:24] <-     counts[c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "HLA-DRA"), 13:24] + 20   obj <- sn_initialize_seurat_object(counts, species = "human")   obj$cell_type <- rep(c("Tcell", "Bcell"), each = 12)   Seurat::Idents(obj) <- obj$cell_type   obj <- Seurat::NormalizeData(obj, verbose = FALSE)   obj <- sn_find_de(obj, analysis = "markers", group_by = "cell_type",     layer = "data", min_pct = 0, logfc_threshold = 0,     store_name = "celltype_markers", return_object = TRUE, verbose = FALSE   )   evidence <- sn_prepare_annotation_evidence(     obj,     de_name = "celltype_markers",     cluster_by = "cell_type"   )   names(evidence) } #> INFO [2026-07-20 05:54:04] Initializing Seurat object for project: Shennong. #> INFO [2026-07-20 05:54:04] Running QC metrics for human. #> INFO [2026-07-20 05:54:04] Seurat object initialization complete. #>  [1] "task"                      "cluster_col"               #>  [3] "source_de_name"            "source_enrichment_name"    #>  [5] "analysis_method"           "species"                   #>  [7] "marker_selection"          "enrichment_selection"      #>  [9] "geometry_reduction"        "cluster_summary"           #> [11] "top_marker_table"          "enrichment_summary"        #> [13] "qc_summary"                "lineage_hints"             #> [15] "canonical_marker_snapshot" "geometry_summary"          #> [17] "caveats"

Use "" retain layers assay. features Optional features keep Seurat/scANVI/scArches references. reduction Optional dimensional reduction keep. code: sn_prepare_pixi_environment(   environment = NULL,   pixi_environment = c("auto", "default", "cpu", "gpu"),   runtime_dir = NULL,   project_dir = NULL,   manifest_path = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   cuda_version = NULL,   platforms = NULL,   mirror = c("default", "auto", "china", "tuna", "ustc", "bfsu"),   install_pixi = FALSE,   install_environment = FALSE,   pixi = NULL,   pixi_version = "latest",   pixi_download_url = NULL,   quiet = FALSE )  sn_call_pixi_environment(   environment = NULL,   command,   args = character(),   pixi_environment = c("auto", "default", "cpu", "gpu"),   runtime_dir = NULL,   project_dir = NULL,   manifest_path = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   cuda_version = NULL,   platforms = NULL,   mirror = c("default", "auto", "china", "tuna", "ustc", "bfsu"),   install_pixi = TRUE,   pixi = NULL,   pixi_version = "latest",   pixi_download_url = NULL,   quiet = FALSE )  sn_call_scvi(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_scanvi(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_mmochi(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_scarches(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_scpoli(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_infercnvpy(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_trajectory(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_cellphonedb(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_cell2location(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_tangram(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_squidpy(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_spatialdata(command, args = character(), ...)  sn_call_stlearn(command, args = character(), ...)

title: Prepare or call a Shennong pixi environment — sn_prepare_pixi_environment
text: environment Python environment name. pixi_environment Pixi environment inside manifest, example "cpu", "gpu", "default". "auto" uses CUDA available GPU-aware configs otherwise CPU/default. runtime_dir Optional Shennong runtime directory. project_dir Optional explicit pixi workspace directory. manifest_path Optional explicit materialized manifest path. overwrite Whether overwrite existing materialized manifest. cuda_version CUDA runtime version used rendering templates. platforms Pixi platform vector. Defaults current platform. mirror Mirror setting passed sn_configure_pixi_mirror(). install_pixi Ensure standalone pixi binary available. install_environment Run pixi install selected environment materializing manifest. pixi Optional pixi executable path. pixi_version Pixi version used installation needed. pixi_download_url Optional custom pixi binary download URL. quiet Logical; suppress status messages possible. command Command run inside pixi environment. args Character vector command arguments. ... Additional arguments passed environment-specific helpers sn_call_pixi_environment().

title: Remove ambient RNA contamination from counts — sn_remove_ambient_contamination

Required method = "soupx" unless recoverable stored initialization metadata. supplied decontx, used background matrix. method One "decontx" "soupx". cluster Optional cluster labels. can vector one value per cell, metadata column name x Seurat object. NULL, clusters inferred sn_run_cluster(). remove_zero_count_cells Logical; TRUE, remove cells whose decontX-corrected counts sum zero. FALSE, keep cells restoring original counts emit warning. layer Layer name used writing corrected counts back Seurat object. Defaults "decontaminated_counts". Use "counts" overwrite original counts layer explicitly. return_object TRUE x Seurat object, return updated Seurat object. Otherwise return corrected counts matrix. verbose Logical; whether print progress helper clustering. ... title: Run cell-cell communication inference — sn_run_cell_communication
text: sn_run_cell_communication() wraps established communication backends stores comparable ligand-receptor schema. Multiple backends can run together calculate method concordance consensus rank.

title: Run cell-cell communication inference — sn_run_cell_communication
code: sn_run_cell_communication(   object,   method = c("liana", "cellchat", "cellphonedb", "nichenet", "multinichenet"),   group_by,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   species = NULL,   sender = NULL,   receiver = NULL,   geneset = NULL,   background_genes = NULL,   condition_by = NULL,   condition_oi = NULL,   condition_reference = NULL,   ligand_target_matrix = NULL,   lr_network = NULL,   expressed_pct = 0.1,   top_n = 50,   cellchat_db = NULL,   min_cells = 10,   population_size = FALSE,   raw_use = TRUE,   resource = NULL,   sample_by = NULL,   consensus = TRUE,   contrast = NULL,   backend_control = list(),   store_name = "default",   return_object = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run cell-cell communication inference — sn_run_cell_communication
text: object Seurat object. method One "liana", "cellchat", "cellphonedb", "nichenet", "multinichenet". legacy alias "nichenetr" accepted. group_by Metadata column defining sender/receiver cell groups. assay, layer Assay layer used retrieve expression. species Species passed species-aware resources. Defaults sn_get_species(object) available. sender, receiver Sender receiver group labels required method = "nichenetr". geneset Receiver gene set interest NicheNet. omitted, receiver differential expression computed condition_by, condition_oi, condition_reference. background_genes Background expressed genes NicheNet. condition_by Metadata column containing receiver conditions. condition_oi, condition_reference Receiver condition contrast used derive geneset NicheNet. ligand_target_matrix, lr_network NicheNet prior matrices/networks. must supplied method = "nichenet". expressed_pct Minimum fraction cells expressing gene considered expressed NicheNet filtering. top_n Number top NicheNet ligands keep. cellchat_db Optional CellChat database object. min_cells Minimum cells per group passed CellChat filtering. population_size, raw_use CellChat communication-probability controls. resource Optional LIANA resource. sample_by Metadata column defining biological samples. supplied, ligand receptor expression aggregated within sample condition comparison. consensus TRUE multiple methods requested, use cross-method consensus ranking primary result table. contrast Optional length-two condition contrast, case first reference second. backend_control Named list method-specific argument lists. store_name Name used object@misc$cell_communication_results. return_object TRUE, return updated Seurat object; otherwise return stored-result list. ... Backend-specific arguments.

title: Run cell-cell communication inference — sn_run_cell_communication

code: sn_run_celltypist(   x,   celltypist = NULL,   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl",   outdir = NULL,   prefix = NULL,   mode = c("best_match", "prob_match"),   p_thres = 0.5,   majority_voting = TRUE,   over_clustering = "auto",   min_prop = 0,   transpose_input = TRUE,   gene_file = NULL,   cell_file = NULL,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts",   xlsx = FALSE,   plot_results = FALSE,   quiet = FALSE )

title: Run CellTypist for automated cell type annotation — sn_run_celltypist
text: x Seurat object path count matrix / AnnData file CellTypist can consume. celltypist Path celltypist binary. Defaults "/opt/mambaforge/envs/scverse/bin/celltypist". model Model used predictions. Defaults "Immune_All_Low.pkl". outdir Directory store output files. NULL, use temporary directory. prefix Prefix output files. default, use model name plus dot. mode Choose cell type largest score/probability ("best_match") enable multi-label classification ("prob_match"). p_thres Probability threshold multi-label classification. Ignored mode = "best_match". majority_voting Logical. Whether refine labels using majority voting -clustering. over_clustering Input file string key specifying existing metadata column AnnData object, "auto". min_prop dominant cell type within subcluster, minimum proportion cells required name subcluster cell type. transpose_input Logical. TRUE, add --transpose-input argument calling celltypist. gene_file provided input mtx format, path file storing gene information. Otherwise ignored. cell_file provided input mtx format, path file storing cell information. Otherwise ignored. assay Assay used exporting Seurat counts CellTypist. Defaults "RNA". layer Layer used input count matrix. Defaults "counts". xlsx Logical. TRUE, merge output tables single Excel (.xlsx). Defaults FALSE. plot_results Logical. TRUE, plot prediction results. Defaults FALSE. quiet Logical. TRUE, hide banner config info celltypist. Defaults FALSE.

what: Run clustering for a single dataset or batch integration workflow — sn_run_cluster
title: Run clustering for a single dataset or batch integration workflow — sn_run_cluster
text: function main clustering entry point Shennong. batch = NULL, performs single-dataset clustering either standard Seurat workflow, SCTransform workflow, single-sample CITE-seq workflow. batch supplied, performs batch integration followed clustering UMAP.

title: Run clustering for a single dataset or batch integration workflow — sn_run_cluster
code: sn_run_cluster(   object,   batch = NULL,   normalization_method = c("seurat", "scran", "sctransform"),   integration_method = c("harmony", "coralysis", "seurat_cca", "seurat_rpca", "scvi",     "scanvi", "totalvi", "mmochi"),   integration_control = list(),   nfeatures = 3000,   hvg_features = NULL,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   resolution = 0.8,   cluster_algorithm = c("louvain", "louvain_multilevel", "slm", "leiden"),   cluster_name = NULL,   cluster_n_start = 10,   cluster_n_iter = 10,   cluster_random_seed = 717,   cluster_group_singletons = TRUE,   leiden_method = c("leidenbase", "igraph"),   leiden_objective_function = c("modularity", "CPM"),   ... )

title: Run clustering for a single dataset or batch integration workflow — sn_run_cluster
text: object Seurat object. batch column name object@meta.data specifying batch labels used integration. NULL, RNA batch integration performed. CITE-seq MMoCHi runs single-sample mode passing internal constant batch key Python backend. normalization_method One "seurat", "scran", "sctransform". "seurat" "scran" workflows can followed supported integration_method batch supplied. SCTransform workflow can currently combined integration_method = "harmony" supplying batch. integration_method Batch-integration backend used batch supplied. Supported values "harmony", "coralysis", "seurat_cca", "seurat_rpca", "scvi", "scanvi", "totalvi". "mmochi" accepted CITE-seq convenience alias requires modality = "cite_seq". "harmony" preserves historical Shennong behavior. "coralysis" runs native Coralysis selected log-normalized feature set stores integrated embedding "coralysis" reduction. "scvi" "scanvi" export selected count matrix pixi-managed scverse environment ~/.shennong/pixi/, run Python backend, import latent representation Seurat reduction. "totalvi" used RNA+ADT CITE-seq workflows usually selected modality = "cite_seq" multimodal_method = "totalvi". integration_control Optional named list backend-specific parameters. "coralysis", use icp_args RunParallelDivisiveICP() arguments, pca_args RunPCA() arguments, store_sce = FALSE trained Coralysis SingleCellExperiment kept object@misc$coralysis. default store_sce = TRUE native Coralysis references can used directly sn_transfer_labels(method = "coralysis"). "seurat_cca" "seurat_rpca", values forwarded Seurat::IntegrateLayers(). "scvi" "scanvi", common fields include runtime_dir, pixi_project, pixi_home, run_dir, pixi, manifest_path, install_pixi, accelerator, cuda_version, mirror, n_latent, max_epochs, model_args, train_args, write_h5ad; "scanvi" additionally requires label_by accepts unlabeled_category. "totalvi" additionally accepts totalvi_model_args, totalvi_train_args, protein_obsm_key. "mmochi" additionally accepts protein_layer, single_peaks, marker_bandwidths, peak_overrides, inclusion_mask, landmark_args, corrected_layer, store_corrected_layer, single_sample_batch_key, keep_single_sample_batch; Shennong runs MMoCHi's ADT landmark registration imports corrected protein matrix protein-derived reduction. batch = NULL, Shennong uses constant internal backend batch key single-sample registration. Seurat accepts arbitrary assay layers, corrected matrix stored corrected_layer; otherwise kept object@misc$mmochi$corrected_protein. Use sn_pixi_paths() inspect generated directory layout, sn_pixi_config_path() inspect bundled inst/pixi/ config, sn_ensure_pixi() preinstall pixi, sn_configure_pixi_mirror() set Shennong-level mirrors. nfeatures Number variable features select. hvg_features Optional character vector user-supplied features force selected backend feature set. PCA-based workflows also feature set used scaling/PCA. features merged internally selected HVGs rare-aware features validating present object. vars_to_regress Covariates regress ScaleData. resolution Resolution parameter FindClusters. cluster_algorithm Community-detection algorithm passed Seurat::FindClusters(). Supported names "louvain" (Seurat algorithm 1), "louvain_multilevel" (algorithm 2), "slm" (algorithm 3), "leiden" (algorithm 4). Numeric values 1 4 also accepted. cluster_name Optional metadata column name cluster labels. Defaults Seurat's "seurat_clusters" behavior. cluster_n_start, cluster_n_iter Number starts iterations passed Seurat::FindClusters(). cluster_random_seed Random seed passed Seurat::FindClusters(). cluster_group_singletons Whether Seurat::FindClusters() group singletons nearest cluster. leiden_method Leiden implementation passed Seurat::FindClusters() cluster_algorithm = "leiden". leiden_objective_function Leiden objective function passed Seurat::FindClusters(). ... Additional clustering controls. Supported names include cluster_control, optional named list additional Seurat::FindClusters() arguments. Values override Shennong's generated defaults. reuse: logical; TRUE, reuse previously recorded sn_run_cluster() stages stored input signatures still match current call. lets resolution-changes start clustering, integration-method changes start integration, HVG changes start feature selection instead rerunning earlier steps. rerun_from: optional stage name forcing recomputation stage onward still allowing earlier matching stages reused. Supported values "normalize", "cell_cycle", "hvg", "pca", "adt", "integration", "neighbors", "clusters", "umap". auto_install: logical; TRUE, install missing optional clustering dependencies leidenbase relevant stage. install_repos: CRAN-like repositories used auto_install installs CRAN packages. install_ask: passed BiocManager::install() auto_install installs Bioconductor packages sn_install_dependencies(). hvg_group_by: optional metadata column used compute highly variable genes within groups merging ranking . NULL batch supplied, Shennong reuses batch default. Use NULL batch = NULL compute HVGs full object. rare_feature_method: optional rare-cell-aware feature methods appended base HVG set PCA/clustering. Supported values "none", "gini", "local_markers". rare_feature_group_by: optional metadata column used define groups "local_markers". NULL, Shennong builds temporary coarse clustering base HVGs. rare_feature_n: number rare-aware features add per selected method. example, c("gini", "local_markers") rare_feature_n = 50 can contribute 100 rare-aware features de-duplication. rare_feature_control: named list advanced rare-feature thresholds. Supported fields group_max_fraction, group_max_cells, gene_max_fraction, min_cells. block_genes: character vector bundled signature queries /custom gene symbols exclude internally selected HVGs. Signature queries can use leaf names "ribo" "cellCycle.G2M" full paths "Programs/cellCycle.G1S"; "g1s" "g2m" kept short aliases cell-cycle signatures. Applies log-normalization SCTransform workflows; explicit hvg_features preserved even overlap blocked signature. theta: theta parameter harmony::RunHarmony, controlling batch diversity preservation vs. correction. Used integration_method = "harmony". group_by_vars: optional column name character vector passed harmony::RunHarmony(group..vars = ...). Defaults batch used integration_method = "harmony". npcs: number PCs compute RunPCA. dims: numeric vector PCs (dimensions) use neighbor search, clustering, UMAP. species: optional species label. Used block genes must resolved built-signatures. assay: assay used clustering. Defaults "RNA". layer: layer used input count matrix. Defaults "counts". modality: workflow modality. "rna" runs standard RNA-workflow. "cite_seq" enables paired RNA+ADT workflows selected multimodal_method. multimodal_method: CITE-seq backend used modality = "cite_seq". "wnn" combines RNA PCA ADT PCA using Seurat's weighted nearest-neighbor workflow clusters "wsnn". "coralysis" runs native Coralysis ADT assay log-normalized protein matrix. "totalvi" runs scvi-tools totalVI RNA counts plus ADT counts clusters imported totalVI latent representation. "mmochi" runs MMoCHi ADT landmark registration across batches, single-sample mode batch = NULL, stores corrected protein matrix supported, computes protein PCA reduction, clusters reduction. NULL, Shennong keeps historical CITE-seq default "wnn" unless integration_method explicitly set one supported multimodal backends. adt_assay: assay containing antibody-derived tag counts modality = "cite_seq". adt_layer: layer adt_assay used ADT counts. adt_features: optional ADT/protein features used CITE-seq backends. Defaults features adt_assay. adt_npcs: number ADT PCs compute modality = "cite_seq". adt_dims: numeric vector ADT PCs used weighted nearest-neighbor graph construction. Defaults seq_len(min(18, adt_npcs)). wnn_control: optional named list additional Seurat::FindMultiModalNeighbors() arguments used modality = "cite_seq". Values override Shennong's generated defaults. umap_control: optional named list additional Seurat::RunUMAP() arguments. Values override Shennong's generated defaults, example n.neighbors, min.dist, spread, metric, seed.use, reduction.name. return_cluster: TRUE, return cluster_by assignments. verbose: whether print/log progress messages.

what: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv
title: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv
text: Runs optional CNV backend, standardizes per-cell chromosome-level evidence, derives reference-calibrated malignancy score, assigns subclones, stores sample-aware diagnostics.

title: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv
code: sn_run_cnv(   object,   method = c("infercnvpy", "copykat"),   reference_cells = NULL,   genome = NULL,   store_name = "cnv",   reference_by = NULL,   reference_cat = NULL,   sample_by = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = NULL,   malignant_threshold = 2,   subclones = 2L,   association_features = 50L,   backend_control = list(),   return_object = TRUE )

title: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv
text: object Seurat object. method CNV backend: "infercnvpy" "copykat". reference_cells Normal reference cell names logical vector. genome Species/genome label. Human mouse supported bundled inferCNVpy positions CopyKAT adapter. store_name Stored result name. reference_by, reference_cat Alternative metadata-based reference definition. sample_by Optional sample/patient metadata column. assay, layer Expression assay layer. CopyKAT use counts; inferCNVpy use normalized data. malignant_threshold Reference-scaled CNV threshold malignant calls. subclones Maximum number fallback hierarchical subclones. association_features Number variable genes tested CNV-expression association. backend_control Named list forwarded selected backend. runner function can provide custom backend adapter. return_object Return modified object unified result.

title: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv
text: Seurat object unified CNV result.

title: Run copy-number and malignancy analysis — sn_run_cnv

what: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo
title: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo
text: wrapper runs standard miloR neighborhood differential abundance workflow Seurat object using one embedding one sample-level group contrast. Cells grouped neighborhoods, counted per sample, tested differential abundance two sample groups.

title: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo
code: sn_run_milo(   x,   sample_by = NULL,   group_by = NULL,   contrast = NULL,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   cells = NULL,   max_cells = NULL,   stratify_by = NULL,   k = 20,   d = NULL,   prop = 0.1,   refined = TRUE,   refinement_scheme = "reduced_dim",   covariates = NULL,   annotation_by = NULL,   fdr_weighting = c("k-distance", "neighbour-distance", "max", "graph-overlap", "none"),   min_mean = 0,   norm_method = c("TMM", "RLE", "logMS"),   store_name = NULL,   return_object = FALSE,   return_intermediate = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo
text: x Seurat object. sample_by Metadata column defining biological samples. group_by Metadata column defining sample-level comparison group. contrast Optional character vector length 2 giving comparison c(case, control). omitted, group_by must contain exactly two levels selected cells. reduction Reduction name used build neighborhoods. Defaults "pca". dims Optional integer vector embedding dimensions retain. cells Optional character vector cells include. max_cells Optional integer cap used subsample cells neighborhood construction. stratify_by Optional metadata column used preserve representation subsampling. Defaults sample_by. k Number neighbors graph neighborhood construction. d Number embedding dimensions passed miloR. Defaults selected embedding dimensionality. prop Proportion cells sampled neighborhood indices. refined Logical; TRUE, use miloR's refined neighborhood sampling. refinement_scheme Refinement scheme passed miloR::makeNhoods(). covariates Optional sample-level covariates added DA design formula alongside group_by. annotation_by Optional cell-level metadata column used annotate neighborhoods miloR::annotateNhoods(). fdr_weighting FDR weighting strategy passed miloR::testNhoods(). min_mean Minimum mean count threshold passed miloR::testNhoods(). norm_method Normalization method passed miloR::testNhoods(). store_name Optional name used object@misc$milo_results. supplied, milo result stored Seurat object. return_object Logical; TRUE store_name supplied, return updated Seurat object. return_intermediate Logical; TRUE, return list DA table, design data, milo object. verbose Logical; TRUE, emit progress logs.

title: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo
text: default, data frame neighborhood-level DA statistics. return_intermediate = TRUE, list table, design_df, milo returned.

title: Run neighborhood differential abundance testing with miloR — sn_run_milo

what: Infer transcription-factor or pathway activity — sn_run_regulatory_activity
title: Infer transcription-factor or pathway activity — sn_run_regulatory_activity

title: Run a Python analysis command through a managed Shennong pixi environment — sn_run_scarches
text: object Seurat object. Shennong writes object Python interchange directory, runs corresponding pixi script, imports supported results. assay Assay used object-level infercnvpy input. layer Assay layer used object-level infercnvpy input. Defaults "data" present otherwise "counts". batch_by, label_by Metadata columns used scArches/scPoli-style object workflows. output_dir Optional run directory. Defaults ~/.shennong/runs/infercnvpy_*. runtime_dir Optional Shennong runtime directory. metadata_prefix Prefix added imported infercnvpy metadata columns. result_name Name used object@misc$infercnvpy. return_object Whether return updated object. FALSE, return run manifest list. method_control Optional named list backend-specific settings passed Python runner config. ... Additional arguments passed sn_call_pixi_environment(). species Species used match bundled gene positions gene_order gtf_file supplied. reference_by Metadata column containing normal/tumor annotations. reference_cat One values reference_by denoting normal reference cells. gene_order Optional data frame gene positions. must contain gene identifier column feature, gene, gene_name, gene_id, plus chromosome/start/end columns. gtf_file Optional GTF file used infercnvpy annotate genomic positions instead Shennong's bundled GENCODE table. gtf_gene_id GTF attribute used infercnvpy matching. adata_gene_id Optional AnnData var column used matching GTF. key_added infercnvpy key used CNV representation. window_size, step, dynamic_threshold, exclude_chromosomes, chunksize, n_jobs, calculate_gene_values, lfc_clip Parameters forwarded infercnvpy.tl.infercnv(). run_pca, run_neighbors, run_leiden, run_umap, score Logical flags downstream infercnvpy analysis steps. leiden_resolution Resolution passed infercnvpy Leiden clustering. cnv_score_group_by Optional grouping column infercnvpy CNV scores. group_by Metadata column used CellPhoneDB cell groups. reference_signatures Optional file path data frame reference cell-state signatures cell2location. spatial_cols Two metadata columns containing spatial coordinates spatial tools. reference_object Optional reference Seurat object tools map query/spatial object single-cell reference, Tangram. reference_assay, reference_layer Assay layer used exporting reference_object. cell_type_by Reference metadata column containing cell-type labels Tangram projection. cluster_by Metadata column used Squidpy neighborhood enrichment.

what: Run scVI or scANVI integration through Shennong — sn_run_scvi
title: Run scVI or scANVI integration through Shennong — sn_run_scvi

title: Run scVI or scANVI integration through Shennong — sn_run_scvi
code: sn_run_scvi(object, batch = NULL, integration_control = list(), ...)  sn_run_scanvi(object, batch = NULL, integration_control = list(), ...)

title: Run scVI or scANVI integration through Shennong — sn_run_scvi
text: object Seurat object. batch column name object@meta.data specifying batch labels used integration. NULL, RNA batch integration performed. CITE-seq MMoCHi runs single-sample mode passing internal constant batch key Python backend. integration_control Optional named list backend-specific parameters. "coralysis", use icp_args RunParallelDivisiveICP() arguments, pca_args RunPCA() arguments, store_sce = FALSE trained Coralysis SingleCellExperiment kept object@misc$coralysis. default store_sce = TRUE native Coralysis references can used directly sn_transfer_labels(method = "coralysis"). "seurat_cca" "seurat_rpca", values forwarded Seurat::IntegrateLayers(). "scvi" "scanvi", common fields include runtime_dir, pixi_project, pixi_home, run_dir, pixi, manifest_path, install_pixi, accelerator, cuda_version, mirror, n_latent, max_epochs, model_args, train_args, write_h5ad; "scanvi" additionally requires label_by accepts unlabeled_category. "totalvi" additionally accepts totalvi_model_args, totalvi_train_args, protein_obsm_key. "mmochi" additionally accepts protein_layer, single_peaks, marker_bandwidths, peak_overrides, inclusion_mask, landmark_args, corrected_layer, store_corrected_layer, single_sample_batch_key, keep_single_sample_batch; Shennong runs MMoCHi's ADT landmark registration imports corrected protein matrix protein-derived reduction. batch = NULL, Shennong uses constant internal backend batch key single-sample registration. Seurat accepts arbitrary assay layers, corrected matrix stored corrected_layer; otherwise kept object@misc$mmochi$corrected_protein. Use sn_pixi_paths() inspect generated directory layout, sn_pixi_config_path() inspect bundled inst/pixi/ config, sn_ensure_pixi() preinstall pixi, sn_configure_pixi_mirror() set Shennong-level mirrors. ... Additional arguments passed sn_run_cluster().

title: Infer trajectories and test dynamic genes — sn_run_trajectory
text: object Seurat object dimensional reduction cluster labels. method Trajectory backend. Slingshot Monocle 3 run directly; Palantir accepts standardized external runner result. reduction Reduction used inference. Defaults PCA, UMAP first available reduction. cluster_by Metadata column containing cluster labels. Defaults seurat_clusters, active identities. start, end Optional start terminal cluster labels. lineages Optional named list expected cluster paths. endpoints constrain Slingshot inferred paths checked . store_name Name used trajectory result type. dims Reduction dimensions used inference. assay Assay used dynamic-gene counts. counts_layer Raw-count layer used tradeSeq. test_dynamic Fit tradeSeq dynamic branch tests. dynamic_features Optional features tested tradeSeq. max_dynamic_features Maximum number dynamic features fitted default. nknots Number tradeSeq spline knots. trend_features Features fitted trends retained. trend_points Number fitted points per lineage feature. backend_control Backend controls. Use named slingshot, monocle3, tradeSeq argument lists direct backends. Palantir accepts runner result; explicit adapter boundary can override Monocle 3 externally managed execution. return_object Return updated object instead result.

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ if (requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)) {   counts <- matrix(rpois(400 * 20, lambda = 3), nrow = 400, ncol = 20)   rownames(counts) <- c(     "MCM5", "PCNA", "TYMS", "FEN1", "MCM2",     "MCM4", "RRM1", "UNG", "GINS2", "MCM6",     "CDCA7", "DTL", "PRIM1", "UHRF1", "HELLS",     "RFC2", "RPA2", "NASP", "RAD51AP1", "GMNN",     "WDR76", "SLBP", "CCNE2", "UBR7", "POLD3",     "MSH2", "ATAD2", "RAD51", "RRM2", "CDC45",     "CDC6", "EXO1", "TIPIN", "DSCC1", "BLM",     "CASP8AP2", "USP1", "CLSPN", "POLA1", "CHAF1B",     "BRIP1", "E2F8",     "HMGB2", "CDK1", "NUSAP1", "UBE2C", "BIRC5",     "TPX2", "TOP2A", "NDC80", "CKS2", "NUF2",     "CKS1B", "MKI67", "TMPO", "CENPF", "TACC3",     "SMC4", "CCNB2", "CKAP2L", "CKAP2", "AURKB",     "BUB1", "KIF11", "ANP32E", "TUBB4B", "GTSE1",     "KIF20B", "HJURP", "CDCA3", "CDC20", "TTK",     "CDC25C", "KIF2C", "RANGAP1", "NCAPD2", "DLGAP5",     "CDCA2", "CDCA8", "ECT2", "KIF23", "HMMR",     "AURKA", "PSRC1", "ANLN", "LBR", "CKAP5",     "CENPE", "CTCF", "NEK2", "G2E3", "GAS2L3",     "CBX5", "CENPA",     paste0("GENE", 1:316)   )   colnames(counts) <- paste0("cell", 1:20)   obj <- sn_initialize_seurat_object(counts, species = "human")   obj <- Seurat::NormalizeData(obj, verbose = FALSE)   obj <- sn_score_cell_cycle(obj, species = "human")   head(obj[[]][, c("S.Score", "G2M.Score", "Phase")]) } } # }

title: Sweep clustering resolutions and summarize cluster-quality diagnostics — sn_sweep_cluster_resolution
text: x Seurat object containing reduction used clustering. resolutions Numeric vector Seurat resolution values evaluate. reduction Reduction name used neighbor construction optional silhouette scoring. Defaults "harmony" present, otherwise "pca". dims Optional integer vector embedding dimensions used FindNeighbors(), FindClusters(), silhouette scoring. cluster_name Metadata column used store temporary cluster assignments. Defaults "seurat_clusters". metrics Metrics calculate resolution. Supported values "n_clusters", "mean_silhouette", "graph_connectivity", "cluster_purity", "clustering_agreement", "rogue". label_by Optional metadata column containing reference labels. Required "cluster_purity" "clustering_agreement". max_cells Optional integer cap used expensive embedding-based metrics silhouette. rogue_max_cells Optional integer cap used "rogue". assay Assay used "rogue" requested. layer Layer used "rogue" requested. neighbor_method Strategy used graph connectivity must rebuild graph embeddings. k Number neighbors used graph connectivity rebuilding graph embeddings. seed Random seed forwarded Seurat clustering subsampling. n_trees Number Annoy trees used graph connectivity neighbor_method = "annoy".

what: Transfer labels from a Seurat reference to a query object — sn_transfer_labels
title: Transfer labels from a Seurat reference to a query object — sn_transfer_labels
text: sn_transfer_labels() Shennong wrapper reference mapping. keeps common path compact: transfer one metadata label, add predicted label_by confidence score back query, store small provenance record query@misc$label_transfer. default method = "seurat" wraps Seurat's FindTransferAnchors() TransferData() workflow. method = "coralysis" projects query onto native Coralysis-trained reference Coralysis::ReferenceMapping(). method = "scanvi" method = "scarches" use managed scVI-family pixi backend train semi-supervised scANVI model reference labels query cells marked unlabeled, import predicted query labels.

title: Transfer labels from a Seurat reference to a query object — sn_transfer_labels
code: sn_transfer_labels(   object = NULL,   reference,   label_by = NULL,   method = c("seurat", "coralysis", "scanvi", "scarches"),   prediction_prefix = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   reference_assay = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   reference_layer = "data",   query_layer = "data",   reduction = "pcaproject",   reference_reduction = NULL,   features = NULL,   dims = 1:30,   npcs = 30,   k_anchor = 5,   k_filter = NA,   k_score = 30,   k_weight = 50,   store_prediction_scores = FALSE,   return_anchors = FALSE,   transfer_control = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Transfer labels from a Seurat reference to a query object — sn_transfer_labels
text: object Seurat query object annotate. argument comes first function can used pipes. reference labeled Seurat reference object. label_by Metadata column reference transfer. method Label-transfer backend. "seurat" uses Seurat anchors; "coralysis" uses native Coralysis::ReferenceMapping() requires trained Coralysis reference stored reference@misc$coralysis; "scanvi" "scarches" use scVI-family pixi backend. prediction_prefix Prefix metadata columns added query. Defaults paste0(label_by, "_transfer"). normalization_method Normalization method passed Seurat::FindTransferAnchors(). reference_assay, query_assay Assays passed Seurat::FindTransferAnchors() Seurat::TransferData(). method = "coralysis", query_assay controls assay converted query logcounts; reference assay ignored stored Coralysis reference available. reference_layer, query_layer Layers used log-normalized expression method = "coralysis". query defaults Seurat "data" layer normalized first layer absent. reduction Dimensional reduction strategy passed Seurat::FindTransferAnchors(). reference_reduction Optional reference reduction passed Seurat::FindTransferAnchors(). features Optional features used find transfer anchors. dims Dimensions used anchor scoring label_by transfer. npcs Number PCs used Seurat::FindTransferAnchors(). k_anchor, k_filter, k_score, k_weight Seurat anchor/weighting parameters. store_prediction_scores TRUE, also store per-label prediction scores query metadata columns. return_anchors TRUE, return list containing annotated query backend artifacts. Coralysis, artifact mapped SingleCellExperiment. transfer_control Optional backend-specific list. method = "coralysis", values forwarded Coralysis::ReferenceMapping(). method = "scanvi" "scarches", common values include batch_by, runtime_dir, pixi_project, max_epochs, scanvi_max_epochs, accelerator, mirror, install_pixi. verbose Whether print Seurat progress messages. ... Additional arguments passed Seurat::FindTransferAnchors().

title: Upload reusable data files to Zenodo — sn_upload_zenodo
code: sn_upload_zenodo(   files,   title,   description = NULL,   creators = NULL,   version = NULL,   record_id = NULL,   new_version = FALSE,   publish = FALSE,   sandbox = FALSE,   token = NULL,   license = "cc-by-4.0",   resource_type = "dataset",   access = c("public", "restricted"),   keywords = NULL,   manifest = TRUE,   manifest_dir = tempdir(),   reserve_doi = TRUE,   dry_run = FALSE,   logger = NULL )

title: Upload reusable data files to Zenodo — sn_upload_zenodo
text: files Character vector local files upload. title Record title. description Record description. NULL, Shennong writes short reusable-data description. creators Creator names. character vector c("Duan, Songqi") simplest form. data frame list name, firstname, lastname, orcid, affiliation/affiliations fields also accepted. version Dataset version string recorded Zenodo metadata Shennong manifest. record_id Optional Zenodo record ID. supplied, new_version = FALSE updates draft; new_version = TRUE creates new version published record. new_version TRUE, create new Zenodo version record_id. publish TRUE, publish record upload. Defaults FALSE users can inspect draft first. sandbox TRUE, use Zenodo sandbox service. token Zenodo access token. NULL, Shennong checks ZENODO_SANDBOX_TOKEN sandbox uploads ZENODO_TOKEN / ZENODO_PAT. license License identifier stored Zenodo rights metadata. resource_type Zenodo resource type ID. Defaults "dataset". access File record access policy. Defaults "public". keywords Optional subject keywords. manifest TRUE, upload shennong_zenodo_manifest.json file checksums provenance. manifest_dir Directory used write temporary manifest file. reserve_doi Whether reserve DOI new drafts. dry_run TRUE, build return planned record manifest without contacting Zenodo. logger Logger level passed zen4R::ZenodoManager$new().

what: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 面向 Codex 的开发路线图 版本：2026-07-15 审查对象：zerostwo/shennong 对照项目：YuLab-SMU/sclet、mengxu98/scop、omicverse/omicverse、tidyplots

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 本阶段只完成两条主线： 补齐 Shennong 的组学分析能力 参考 sclet、scop 和 OmicVerse 的分析方法，审查 Shennong 当前已经具备的能力、仍然缺失的主分析环节，以及应该优先增加的后端。 建立 Shennong 的发表级图形系统 在现有 sn_plot_*()、自动点大小、调色板、栅格化和 panel 尺寸基础上，建设一套根据数据规模、分组数量、panel 数量和输出目标自动确定图形尺寸与排版的 Figure Engine。 本阶段不优先实现： MCP server； REST API； 完整 Agent 产品； 新的统一生物对象； Shennong DB 的服务端功能； Web UI。 但是新增分析函数必须保持 Agent-ready： 输入参数可序列化； 输出结构明确； 无交互式菜单； 可记录 provenance； 可以映射为未来的 JSON Schema。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 不应通过“包装最多的方法”与 scop 或 OmicVerse 竞争。 Shennong 的差异化应当是： 为真实生物信息学项目提供有明确默认方法、完整分析闭环、统一结果语义和发表级输出的 R 工作流。 建议形成以下产品特征： 而不是： sclet 值得借鉴的是： 以真实研究问题组织分析 mainline； analysis-state contract； 每个结果可查询、可审计； Python 环境隔离； workflow shell 将独立方法串联成完整路径。 scop 值得借鉴的是： 单细胞和空间方法覆盖广； Seurat v5 实战兼容； 多种 annotation、trajectory、communication 和 spatial backend； 大量针对结果的专用图形。 OmicVerse 值得借鉴的是： bulk、single-cell、spatial 和 multi-omics 的模块化分区； function registry； lazy loading； annotation、trajectory、GRN、metabolism、CNV、drug response 和报告能力； Python 重型后端的可选加载。 Shennong 不应复制它们的全部方法，而应选择少量高价值默认后端，并为每一条主线提供：
code: 可靠的数据接入         + 经过选择的分析主线         + 统一结果与诊断         + 发表级智能可视化         + 可选的 R/Python 后端 数百个互不关联的 RunXXX() wrapper validate → run → diagnose → store → plot → interpret

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 本次比较基于 2026-07-15 可见的仓库接口，而不是仅依据项目宣传。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 当前 NAMESPACE 已经导出以下主要能力： 数据读取与写出：10x、10x Spatial、H5、H5AD、BPCells、qs/qs2、STARsolo； 数据下载、Zenodo 索引及 Shennong Data Server； 细胞和基因过滤； doublet detection； ambient RNA correction； cell-cycle scoring； Seurat 聚类和多种 integration backend； scVI、scANVI、scArches、scPoli； integration assessment； CellTypist 和 label transfer； marker/DE、pseudobulk、enrichment； composition、RO/E、Milo； regulatory activity； CellChat、LIANA/NicheNet/CellPhoneDB 类通信分析； BayesPrism/CIBERSORTx 类 bulk deconvolution； InferCNVpy； cell2location、Tangram、Squidpy、stLearn、SpatialData； scDesign3 simulation； ellmer-based interpretation； 基础发表风格图形。 这说明 Shennong 已经不是一个早期空壳，下一阶段应当补齐主分析链条，而不是重写已有功能。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: sclet 基于 SingleCellExperiment，将分析组织为 11 条 mainline： 数据接入与互操作； 核心单细胞流程； 整合； 参考映射和注释； trajectory、velocity 和 fate； gene program、regulon 和 mechanistic interpretation； DE、pseudobulk 和 enrichment； cell-cell communication； perturbation priority 和 rare-cell detection； spatial deconvolution、colocalization 和 niche； multimodal expansion。 它还提供： AuditAnalysisChain()； PipelineSummary()； CommandLog()； get_*() / has_*() 结果访问器； SummarizeContextForLLM()； workflow-level 函数。 值得借鉴的是“状态和主线”，而不是它的 Seurat 风格函数命名。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: scop 的优势是极广的单细胞和空间方法覆盖，包括： 多种 QC、doublet、decontamination； 多种降维和整合； CellTypist、SingleR、SciBet、scmap、Symphony 等注释； CytoTRACE/FitDevo； Slingshot、Monocle、PAGA、Palantir、CellRank、WOT、scVelo； GSVA、GSEA、metabolism、scFEA； DoRothEA、SCENIC/SCENIC+ 和多种 GRN； CellChat、CellPhoneDB、LIANA、NicheNet、MultiNicheNet； Milo、propeller、scCODA； Augur、Scissor、RareQ、-silico perturbation； 广泛的 spatial domain、SVG、deconvolution、neighborhood、integration 和 communication 方法； bulk DE、deconvolution 和组成分析。 它的风险也很明显：公共 API 极大，方法选择成本和依赖维护成本高。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: OmicVerse 当前将功能分为： bulk； single； space； bulk2single； metabol； protein； genetics； AIRR； epigenomics； agent/MCP/report。 其中单细胞模块包含： SCSA、MetaTiME、GPT annotation、CellVote 和 ontology mapping； VIA、Monocle-like trajectory、pseudotime fate、velocity 和 CellRank； SCENIC、GRN、NMF/cNMF、Hotspot； Milo、Augur、perturbation 和 dynamic features； CNV； metabolism 和 metabolite communication； CellPhoneDB、LIANA； MOFA、GLUE、SIMBA、TOSICA； drug-response prediction。 bulk 模块包含： DESeq2-like DE； WGCNA； GSEA； PPI/STRING； TCGA； batch correction； deconvolution。 spatial 模块包含： STAGATE、CellCharter 和 CAST； STAligner； SVG/Moran’s ； spatial trajectory； Tangram； spatial deconvolution； H&E 到表达预测。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 图例： 完整：已有清晰用户接口和结果工作流； 部分：已有后端或单点函数，但尚未形成完整分析主线； 缺失：当前公共 API 中没有明确实现； 延后：不应在当前里程碑优先实现。

id: id_411-一个研究问题对应一个稳定入口
what: 4.1.1 一个研究问题对应一个稳定入口
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 不要为每个后端创建一个同等地位的顶层函数。 推荐： 不推荐继续扩张： 底层专用函数可以作为 internal adapter：
code: sn_run_annotation(   object,   method = "singleR" )  sn_run_trajectory(   object,   method = "slingshot" )  sn_score_programs(   object,   method = "ucell" ) sn_run_singleR() sn_run_scmap() sn_run_symphony() sn_run_slingshot() sn_run_monocle3() sn_run_palantir() .sn_annotation_singleR() .sn_annotation_celltypist() .sn_trajectory_slingshot() .sn_trajectory_cellrank()

id: id_412-默认后端必须有明确选择
what: 4.1.2 默认后端必须有明确选择
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 的价值是帮助用户做合理选择，而不是把后端列表交还给用户。 建议默认：

what: 4.1.3 不切换 Python 环境管理方案
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: sclet 使用 basilisk 的思想值得借鉴，但 Shennong 已经决定使用 pixi 管理 Python 后端。 本阶段应保持： 不要同时维护： pixi； basilisk； reticulate-managed conda； 用户全局 Python。
code: R public API     ↓ structured input files     ↓ pixi environment     ↓ Python script     ↓ structured artifacts

what: 4.1.4 重型依赖继续放在 Suggests 或 pixi
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 核心安装必须保持轻量。 每个可选方法必须提供： 返回：
code: sn_method_status("cellrank") Method: cellrank Available: FALSE Runtime: pixi Environment: trajectory Install action: sn_prepare_pixi_environment("trajectory")

id: id_42-先建立最小分析结果契约
what: 4.2 先建立最小分析结果契约
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 不要求本阶段创建新的 ShennongObject，但必须统一新增方法的结果结构。 建议内部结构： 继续存入当前集中注册的 object@misc result collections。 必须新增或统一： 现有的： 可以暂时保留，但底层必须读取同一 schema。
code: result <- list(   schema_version = "1.0",   analysis_type = "trajectory",   name = "cd8_slingshot",   method = "slingshot",   backend = "slingshot",   input = list(     assay = "RNA",     layer = "data",     reduction = "umap",     cells = 12543L,     features = 2000L   ),   parameters = list(),   tables = list(),   embeddings = list(),   graphs = list(),   models = list(),   diagnostics = list(),   warnings = character(),   provenance = list(     package_versions = list(),     random_seed = 1L,     timestamp = ""   ) ) sn_store_result(object, type, name, result) sn_get_result(object, type, name) sn_list_results(object, type = NULL) sn_delete_result(object, type, name) sn_validate_result(result) sn_get_de_result() sn_get_enrichment_result() sn_get_milo_result()

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: P1 完成后，Shennong 应当能够从 count matrix 一直完成到机制解释和论文图，而不需要用户切换到另一个综合包。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 已有： sn_run_celltypist()； sn_transfer_labels()； scANVI； scArches； scPoli； annotation evidence； LLM interpretation。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
code: sn_run_annotation(   object,   group_by = "seurat_clusters",   method = c(     "consensus",     "singleR",     "celltypist",     "seurat",     "symphony",     "scmap",     "scanvi"   ),   reference = NULL,   tissue = NULL,   disease = NULL,   species = NULL,   ontology = TRUE,   store_name = "annotation" )

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 标准输出至少包括： cell-level prediction； cluster-level prediction； level 1/2/3 label； prediction score； second-best label； margin； supporting markers； conflicting markers； reference coverage； ontology identifier； low-confidence flag。
code: cluster markers     + reference prediction     + canonical marker database     + negative marker conflicts     + tissue/disease context     ↓ candidate labels     ↓ confidence calibration     ↓ hierarchical label

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 以下公式作为第一版启发式规则，随后通过 golden figures 校准。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 输入： n_cells； n_panels； n_groups； max_label_chars； 是否显示 cluster label； 是否 split。 建议： panel： legend： n_groups <= 8：右侧； 9–18：右侧多列或底部； >18：底部多列； 长 label 优先底部； 30 类别时发出“颜色区分不足”警告。
code: point_size <- clamp(   1.2 * (n_cells / 1000)^(-0.35),   min = 0.03,   max = 1.6 )  rasterize <- n_cells * n_panels > 50000 单 panel：55–75 mm 正方形 多 panel：每 panel 至少 45–55 mm

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 规则： gene label 长度决定左边距； grouped feature list 使用 free-width facet； 40 genes 自动建议分页； 25 groups 自动减小 dot scale 并旋转标签； 保证最终字号不低于 profile 最小字号。
code: width =   left_label_margin   + n_groups × 4–6 mm   + legend_width  height =   top_margin   + n_features × 3.5–5 mm   + facet_strip_height

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 输入： rows； columns/groups； annotation tracks； label lengths； cell-level 或 average。 规则： cell-level 大矩阵默认 rasterize body； row/column labels、annotation 和 legend 保持 vector； 100 rows 自动分页或只标记 selected labels； average heatmap 按 group 数计算宽度； 50 groups 时优先横向分页； output PDF 中禁止数百万个 vector rect。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 自动行为： category <= 6：垂直； category 7–15：扩大宽度或旋转 30–45°； category >15：建议 horizontal； 显著性 bracket 增加顶部空间； paired data 自动预留连接线； sample-level points 优先显示，cell-level points 仅作背景。
code: width =   max(     profile minimum,     n_categories × category_width     + label_margin     + comparison_margin   )

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 根据 sample 数和 cell-type 数决定： bar width； legend 行列； palette warning； 是否显示 label； 是否转为 heatmap； sample >30 时建议横向或 heatmap。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 根据 node/edge 数： <=15 nodes：完整 label； 16–40：缩小 label、过滤低权重 edge； 40：默认聚合到 pathway 或 cell type； chord/network 不允许在默认状态展示数千条 edge； 自动返回过滤摘要。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 根据： spot/cell 数； tissue aspect ratio； image pixel dimensions； facet 数； scale bar； crop。 空间图必须保持真实坐标比例，不使用固定正方形强制拉伸。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 应保持显式、可发现的函数，同时减少重复参数。 所有 sn_plot_*() 尽量共享： "auto" 必须是真正由 figure engine 解析，而不是每个函数各写一套逻辑。 内部统一：
code: profile = NULL width = "auto" height = "auto" font_size = "auto" rasterize = "auto" raster_dpi = "auto" palette = "auto" legend = "auto" labels = "auto" spec <- .sn_build_figure_spec(   plot_type,   data_summary,   profile,   overrides )  p <- .sn_render_... p <- .sn_apply_figure_spec(p, spec)  attr(p, "shennong_figure_spec") <- spec

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 支持： PDF； SVG； TIFF； PNG。 默认： PDF/SVG：文字和几何保持 vector； 高密度点/heatmap body：局部 raster； TIFF：600 dpi 用于线稿/混合图； PNG：屏幕和文档预览； 背景显式； 不依赖当前 RStudio device 尺寸。
code: sn_save_figure(   plot,   filename,   profile = NULL,   width = "auto",   height = "auto",   units = "mm",   dpi = "auto",   background = "white",   embed_fonts = TRUE,   validate = TRUE )

id: id_21-每个新分析方法的完成定义
what: 21. 每个新分析方法的完成定义
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 一个方法只有同时满足以下条件才算完成： 有清晰的顶层 Shennong API； 有 input validation； 有合理默认 method； optional dependency 不会破坏 package load； 返回或存储统一 result schema； 保存参数、版本、seed 和 warnings； 有 getter； 有至少一个诊断图； 有至少一个 publication plot； 有 testthat 测试； 有最小示例； 有完整 vignette； R CMD check 通过； Linux/macOS/Windows 中可运行的 R 方法有 CI； Python backend 有 CPU smoke test； 大数据路径不会无意 densify sparse matrix； API 参数可以转换为 JSON。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 所有现有 sn_plot_*() 返回原生可编辑对象； 每张图具有 shennong_figure_spec； sn_save_figure() 不依赖当前 device； 支持 mm//cm； PDF/SVG vector 元素保持 vector； 大点层和 heatmap 可局部 raster； 自动尺寸随数据复杂度单调变化； 用户覆盖参数优先； 有 single/double column profile； 有 figure validation； 有 multipage； 有 source-data export； 有 visual regression； 所有 vignette 图由同一导出系统生成； 图例、字体和 panel 在最终物理尺寸下可读。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 不必复制它的全部 Run*() 风格。 应吸收： state-aware results； workflow mainline； provenance； AI evidence summary。 Shennong 的差异： 更强的数据服务连接； 更强的 Seurat 大数据实战； pixi Python runtime； 更完整的 bulk/spatial 计划； publication figure engine。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 不应比拼函数数量。 应吸收： annotation/trajectory/spatial 的核心方法； 结果专用图形； 多种 optional backend。 Shennong 的差异： 更少但更有主次的方法； 自动 backend recommendation； 统一结果 schema； 明确 diagnostic； 发表尺寸感知； figure QA； 数据和结果可回写 Shennong 生态。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: Shennong 不应在当前阶段复制所有 Python 深度学习模块。 应吸收： 模块化； function registry； lazy optional dependencies； bulk/single/spatial 分区； analysis report。 Shennong 的差异： R/Bioconductor/Seurat 用户优先； 统计 design 优先； 结果可审计； 默认方法透明； publication-ready output 为核心产品，而不是附属 plotting module。

title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 严格按照以下顺序： Figure Engine 可以与分析方法并行开发，但必须先稳定： 再大量添加新的 plot types。
code: 1. 分析 method registry 和 result contract 2. annotation consensus 3. per-cell program scoring 4. trajectory + dynamic genes 5. differential abundance 6. communication result standardization 7. spatial SVG/domain/neighborhood 8. bulk QC/DE/pathway 9. Figure Engine core 10. 迁移现有图形 11. 新分析结果图形 12. velocity/fate/GRN 等重型后端 13. multimodal figure profile auto size export validation

what: 25. 对 Codex 的直接执行要求
title: Shennong 分析能力补全与发表级可视化实施规范
text: 不一次性增加大量依赖。 不把 Python 包加入 R 的强制依赖。 不使用 eval(parse())。 不在顶层 API 暴露任意 Python 函数名。 不无意将 sparse matrix 转成 dense matrix。 不在每个函数重复实现 result storage。 不在每个 plot 函数重复实现尺寸逻辑。 不删除现有测试以让新实现通过。 不降低现有 Seurat 兼容性。 每个 PR 使用 conventional commit。 NAMESPACE； roxygen； _pkgdown.yml； vignette； tests； NEWS.md； docs/codex/Decisions.md。 为什么选它； 什么情况下不应使用； 输入要求； 输出结构； CPU/GPU； 依赖安装； 引用。
