text: Shennong 应成为一个能够完成真实组学分析闭环，并默认生成可直接进入论文初稿图形的 R 生物信息学框架。

title: Version 0.2.0
text: Released 2026-07-15.

title: Version 0.2.0
text: multimodal roadmap test now scopes sn_run_cluster() mock one expression, preventing four-formal test double leaking later installed-package clustering tests. sn_run_cluster() now dispatches long-standing tail controls compact, allowlisted compatibility wrapper. Named calls, positional tail calls, explicit NULL values, defaults preserved one named argument bundle, avoiding long-formal dispatch R 4.6 development runner. Scissor Symphony validate required user inputs checking optional backend installations, dependency-independent contract errors remain testable minimal installations. pkgdown deployment workflow now installs UCell evaluating program-scoring article, documented default method = "ucell" backend available clean GitHub Actions runners. data-/O article longer performs unconditional Zenodo downloads pkgdown deployment; network-backed examples now require explicit SHENNONG_RUN_NETWORK_VIGNETTES=true opt-. sn_plot_dot() now renders named feature lists Seurat’s free-width marker facets without adding incompatible fixed coordinate ratio; ordinary feature vectors retain existing fixed-coordinate layout. sn_plot_feature(raster = TRUE) now falls back vector point layers optional ggrastr package unavailable, instead asking Seurat perform ordered rasterization failing minimal-dependency checks. sn_load_data(backend = "api") now uses current ShennongData 0.2 resource-client contract (sn_connect(), sn_load_data(), sn_assay(), collect()) rather retired schema endpoint interface. sn_run_cluster(normalization_method = "sctransform") now applies block_genes SCTransform-selected HVGs PCA, preventing default ribosomal, mitochondrial, heat-shock, immunoglobulin, TCR, pseudogene signatures dominating SCT-based clustering unless explicitly forced via hvg_features. sn_run_cluster(block_genes = ...) now resolves entry independently, bundled signature queries cellCycle.G2M, cellCycle.G1S, ribo, mito, heatshock, pseudogenes can mixed custom gene symbols removed final stored HVG set. sn_write() now creates missing parent directories dispatching rio custom writers, nested .qs, .h5ad, .h5, BPCells outputs longer fail containing directory exist. sn_write() now auto-installs missing optional writer dependencies default custom formats .qs2, .h5ad, .h5, BPCells. .qs output now attempts install qs GitHub remote qsbase/qs, .qs2 remains recommended new serialization format. sn_run_cluster() now uses batch integration metadata argument; older batch_by alias removed entry point. GitHub Actions now install leidenbase anywhere evaluated clustering examples tests can request cluster_algorithm = "leiden". sn_run_cluster(cluster_algorithm = "leiden") now checks leidenbase calling Seurat auto-installs sn_install_dependencies() default. Set auto_install = FALSE keep previous fail-fast behavior. sn_run_cluster() now skips redundant Seurat PCA work integration backends consume Seurat PCA reduction, including Coralysis, scVI/scANVI, totalVI, MMoCHi, CITE-seq protein-Coralysis/MMoCHi paths. Native Coralysis clustering now stores trained SingleCellExperiment object@misc$coralysis default, returned object can used directly label-transfer reference. Set integration_control = list(store_sce = FALSE) clustering-runs Coralysis reference object needed. sn_run_cluster() now calls configurable Seurat steps FindClusters() RunUMAP() symbolic object calls rather .call(object = object, ...), preventing object@commands entries serializing full Seurat object command-history call strings. Grouped HVG selection sn_run_cluster() now skips cells missing empty hvg_group_by labels runs temporary per-group HVG calls selected assay , avoiding spurious ADT assay removal messages multimodal objects. SCTransform workflows sn_run_cluster() sn_normalize_data() now temporarily raise future.globals.maxSize detected system memory object size calling Seurat, avoiding default 500 MiB future export limit large objects restoring caller’s option afterwards. Package source builds now exclude local benchmark outputs OmnipathR test log directories, keeping R CMD build tarballs small free generated validation artifacts. Package source builds git status now ignore local .codegraph/, .agents/, .codex/ agent artifacts, keeping analysis state source builds commits. Signature catalog add/update/delete helpers now edit packaged Shennong signature tree directly, custom signature maintenance longer requires optional upstream SignatuR package runtime. .qs writer parent-directory regression test now mocks optional writer dependency detection completely, avoiding live GitHub installation attempts local tests. Local CIBERSORTx execution now uses structured system2() calls instead pasted shell command, dry-run/stored command artifacts redact CIBERSORTx account email token values. scripts/check-prepush.R now reports per-step timings, defaults local checks _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=false, skips duplicate test execution inside R CMD check successful full test_local() pass, adds --quick edit-loop mode. Stored-result writes Shennong’s shared object@misc helper now pass central collection registry schema validator. Malformed stored DE/enrichment/interpretation/deconvolution/Milo/communication/regulatory/QC entries now fail early actionable schema error, sn_list_results() also reports stored QC assessments. Enrichment wrappers now muffle known benign clusterProfiler/fgsea warnings produced tiny deterministic examples, keeping local test package-check output warning-clean preserving hard errors, including current enrichit qvalue fallback tiny result estimate q values.

title: Version 0.2.0
text: Added explicit sn_run_multimodal() CITE-seq entry point keeping annotation, trajectory, fate backend adapters internal unified workflow APIs. Added direct optional Monocle 3 trajectory inference plus standardized Palantir runner/result scCODA/pertpy runner/result adapters. shipped method-registry entries now implemented, scCODA retains biological samples inferential unit. Added publication figure engine generic screen/column/page/slide profiles, automatic size/point/raster/layout/pagination specifications, structured figure QA, deterministic PDF/SVG/TIFF/PNG export, reproducible figure bundles containing source data, specs, sessions, manifests, checksums. Added result-aware DE/GSEA/enrichment figures plus QC threshold, doublet, ambient correction, HVG, elbow, cluster tree, resolution sweep, integration, reference-projection diagnostics. Core dimensional, feature, dot, heatmap, violin, box, bar, composition, Milo, bulk plots now carry figure specifications without changing native plot classes. Added standalone bulk transcriptomics mainline matrix/list/ SummarizedExperiment inputs: sample QC, design-aware edgeR/DESeq2/limma/ dream differential expression, pathway scoring, WGCNA module-trait analysis, Cox survival models, clinical associations, result-aware plots. Added sn_run_spatial() dispatcher plus explicit spatial feature, domain, neighborhood, deconvolution, mapping, integration, communication entry points. Local Moran’s memory-bounded KNN workflows retain spatial graphs, permutation evidence, co-occurrence, coordinates, diagnostics; nnSVG/BANKSY run installed heavyweight alternatives use explicit result adapters. Added spatial coordinate, feature, domain, SVG, neighborhood, deconvolution, distance-aware communication plots preserve tissue aspect ratio. Added sn_run_velocity() sn_plot_velocity() managed scVelo pixi backend spliced/unspliced preprocessing, projected velocity vectors, velocity pseudotime/confidence, transition edges, retained H5AD evidence. Added sn_run_fate() sn_plot_fate() managed CellRank GPCCA backend terminal-state discovery, fate probabilities, optional lineage drivers, metadata storage, explicit terminal-state controls. Added sn_discover_programs() sn_plot_discovered_programs() multi-restart NMF reconstruction/stability diagnostics plus explicit cNMF Hotspot result adapters. Discovered gene weights per-cell activities use shared result contract can stratified metadata. Added sn_run_grn() sn_plot_regulon() real GENIE3 inference explicit pySCENIC, legacy SCENIC, GRNBoost2 adapters. Results standardize regulatory edges, regulons, per-cell activity, transparent group specificity without hiding external motif databases Python runtimes. Added sn_run_cnv() sn_plot_cnv() unified inferCNVpy/CopyKAT workflow. Stored results now include reference-calibrated malignancy scores, malignant calls, subclones, sample summaries, chromosome-level CNV, optional CNV UMAP coordinates, CNV-expression associations. Added sn_metabolic_signatures(), sn_run_metabolism(), sn_plot_metabolism() curated UCell/GSVA/ssGSEA/mean pathway activity, sample-level differential metabolism, scMetabolism, standardized scFEA/Compass result adapters. Expanded sn_run_cell_communication() multi-backend communication workflow LIANA, CellChat, CellPhoneDB, NicheNet, MultiNicheNet. backends now map shared ligand-receptor schema method concordance, consensus ranks, sample-level expression evidence, condition contrasts, ligand-target links, retained backend artifacts, reserved spatial distance field. Added bubble, heatmap, network, chord, river, ligand-target, differential-communication plots. Added sn_test_abundance() stable differential-abundance entry point sample-level Propeller, transparent sample-label permutation, neighborhood-level Milo. Results include standardized effects, adjusted significance, completed sample proportions, sample contributions, design data, backend evidence, permutation nulls applicable. Added sn_prioritize_states() sample-aware Augur-style held-separability, explicit bulk-input Scissor selection, RareQ topology discovery followed sample-level phenotype association. State rankings, cell scores, uncertainty, null distributions, sample contributions use shared result contract; sn_plot_abundance() sn_plot_state_priority() render stored results. Added sn_run_trajectory() Slingshot lineage inference optional tradeSeq dynamic-gene, branch-pattern, differential-end, convergence, fitted-trend outputs. Per-lineage pseudotime/probability, principal curves, terminal states, topology, diagnostics, provenance use unified analysis-result contract, primary lineage/pseudotime also added Seurat metadata. Added result-aware trajectory, pseudotime, lineage-probability, dynamic-heatmap, gene-trend, branch-comparison plots sn_plot_trajectory(), sn_plot_pseudotime(), sn_plot_lineage_probability(), sn_plot_dynamic_heatmap(), sn_plot_gene_trend(), sn_plot_branch_comparison(). Added sn_score_programs() UCell (default per-cell), AUCell, GSVA, ssGSEA, sparse-aware mean-expression backends. records signature feature coverage, stores long-form scores unified result contract, adds cell-level scores Seurat metadata without silently converting large sparse matrices GSVA. Added sn_test_programs() condition comparisons aggregate sample/patient level inference sample_by supplied, plus sn_plot_program_activity() sn_plot_program_heatmap() stored score results. Added sn_run_annotation() stable annotation entry point marker-consensus plus optional SingleR, CellTypist, Seurat transfer, Symphony, scmap, scANVI backends. stores cell- cluster-level hierarchical labels, calibrated confidence/margin, runner-labels, marker support/conflicts, reference coverage, raw backend predictions, diagnostics, provenance unified result contract. Added sn_annotation_consensus(), sn_annotation_confidence(), sn_map_cell_ontology(), sn_review_annotation() transparent evidence aggregation, versioned bundled Cell Ontology snapshot, explicit low-confidence review without allowing LLM output overwrite computational labels. Added result-aware annotation confidence, marker-evidence, confusion plots sn_plot_annotation_confidence(), sn_plot_annotation_markers(), sn_plot_annotation_confusion(). Added shipped method registry sn_list_methods() sn_method_status(). records runtime, optional dependency, installation action, input/output contract, CPU/GPU expectations, citations, whether current planned backend actually implemented available. Added versioned generic analysis-result contract sn_store_result(), sn_get_result(), sn_delete_result(), sn_validate_result(). Existing registered DE, enrichment, Milo, communication, deconvolution, regulatory, QC, interpretation results upgraded write/read without breaking specialized getters. sn_list_results() now accepts optional type filter includes new generic result types stored object@misc$analysis_results. sn_load_data() can open lazy Shennong Data Server resources backend = "api", select assay/layer views api_args, materialize explicitly lazy = FALSE. sn_convert_bpcells() now converts selected Seurat assay layers BPCells-backed matrix directories rebinds layers returned object, helping large count normalized-expression layers stay disk. sn_annotate_de_features() now flags stored marker/DE genes encode transcription factors, cell-surface plasma-membrane proteins, cytokines, chemokines. can annotate direct DE tables store annotated tables back object@misc$de_results retrieval sn_get_de_result(). sn_prepare_label_transfer_reference() now creates compact reference objects sn_transfer_labels(). native Coralysis, keeps trained Coralysis models, PCA model, feature names, selected labels dropping reference assays, reductions, stored joint probabilities. Seurat, scANVI, scArches workflows, returns slim Seurat reference selected assay layers labels. sn_run_cluster() now accepts umap_control, named list Seurat::RunUMAP() arguments n.neighbors, min.dist, spread, metric, seed.use, reduction.name, users can tune embedding geometry without rerunning Coralysis, neighbor graph construction, clustering. sn_run_cluster(modality = "cite_seq") now runs Seurat CITE-seq weighted nearest-neighbor clustering paired RNA ADT assays, including ADT CLR normalization, ADT PCA, weighted.nn / wsnn graph construction, clustering, wnn.umap embedding. sn_run_cluster(modality = "cite_seq", multimodal_method = ...) now exposes unified CITE-seq backend selector. addition Seurat WNN, users can run native Coralysis ADT protein assay, scvi-tools totalVI paired RNA ADT counts, MMoCHi ADT landmark registration managed pixi backend. sn_run_cluster(modality = "cite_seq", multimodal_method = "mmochi") now supports single-sample CITE-seq runs batch = NULL passing constant internal batch key MMoCHi backend instead requiring user-supplied batch column. sn_run_cluster() now records reusable stage signatures normalization, cell-cycle scoring, HVG/rare-feature selection, PCA, integration, neighbor graph construction, clustering, UMAP. Re-running output reuses matching stages default, changing resolution starts clustering, changing integration_method starts integration, changing HVG controls starts feature selection. Use reuse = FALSE rerun_from = "hvg" / "integration" / another stage force recompute. sn_run_cluster() now exposes key Seurat::FindClusters() controls, including cluster_algorithm = "leiden" / "louvain" / "slm", custom cluster metadata names, random seed, start/iteration counts, singleton handling, Leiden method/objective options. sn_calculate_variance_explained() now ranks metadata variables platform, study, tissue, sample weighted embedding variance explained, single-variable partial multi-variable modes batch-effect diagnostics. sn_calculate_roe() now computes observed--expected enrichment categorical composition tables Seurat metadata data frames, long table output default optional matrix output heatmaps. sn_transfer_labels() now wraps reference mapping query-first API pipe-friendly workflows. default Seurat anchor workflow retained, method = "coralysis" now projects queries onto Coralysis-trained references native Coralysis::ReferenceMapping(). method = "scanvi" method = "scarches" now provide semi-supervised scVI-family label transfer pixi-managed scverse backend. sn_upload_zenodo() now uploads reusable data files Zenodo zen4R, simple draft-first interface automatically uploaded Shennong manifest records dataset version, package version, file sizes, md5 checksums, sha256 checksums reproducible reuse. sn_download_zenodo() now downloads reusable files public Zenodo records without requiring token, optional token support restricted records. sn_load_data() now uses download layer accepts multiple example datasets dataset = c("pbmc1k", "pbmc3k"); filtered datasets returned one merged Seurat object raw datasets named list sparse matrices. sn_list_datasets() now lists sample-level datasets available Shennong public Zenodo collection. sn_load_data() can load samples shennong_index.json layout Zenodo record 20044788, downloading study ZIP, extracting requested sample’s filtered/raw H5 Cell Ranger metrics file, optionally validating extracted files manifest.tsv. sn_simulate() now provides method-based simulation entry point. method = "scdesign3" wraps scDesign3::scdesign3() Seurat SingleCellExperiment inputs can return simulated counts Seurat object, SingleCellExperiment, sparse matrix, raw scDesign3 result. sn_simulate_scdesign3() remains backend-specific wrapper. sn_plot_heatmap() now draws focused heatmaps user-selected genes, cell-level group-averaged modes, optional grouping/splitting, default rasterization, hidden cell names/ticks, 8 pt group labels, Paired group-bar colors, automatic scaling requested features needed. sn_run_cell_communication() now wraps real cell-cell communication backends: CellChat, NicheNet (nichenetr), LIANA. Results can stored retrieved sn_store_cell_communication() sn_get_cell_communication_result(). sn_run_regulatory_activity() now runs fast footprint-style activity inference DoRothEA regulons PROGENy pathway models decoupleR::run_ulm(). Results can stored retrieved sn_store_regulatory_activity() sn_get_regulatory_activity_result(). sn_run_cluster() now accepts integration_method batch workflows. addition historical Harmony path, users can run Coralysis multi-level integration Seurat layer integration CCA/RPCA clustering entry point. sn_run_cluster() now accepts integration_method = "scvi" "scanvi". backends export selected count data pixi-managed scverse runtime ~/.shennong/pixi/, run Python model, import latent representation Seurat reduction, continue Shennong’s neighbors/clustering/UMAP workflow. scANVI path requires integration_control = list(label_by = ...). Convenience wrappers sn_run_scvi() sn_run_scanvi() expose workflows directly. New pixi helpers sn_check_pixi(), sn_install_pixi(), sn_ensure_pixi(), sn_pixi_paths(), sn_list_pixi_environments(), sn_pixi_config_path(), sn_prepare_pixi_environment(), sn_call_pixi_environment(), sn_detect_accelerator(), sn_configure_pixi_mirror() expose Python-runtime setup used scVI/scANVI future Python backends. Shennong now keeps pixi workspaces ~/.shennong/pixi/, renders package-bundled configs inst/pixi/, can auto-install pixi missing, selects CPU CUDA pixi environments automatically, can write China mirror configuration Shennong PIXI_HOME. Bundled pixi configs command helpers available concrete Python method families including scvi (shared scVI/scANVI), scarches (shared scArches/scPoli), infercnvpy, cellphonedb, cell2location, tangram, squidpy, spatialdata, stlearn. Use environment calls sn_call_cell2location() analysis wrappers sn_run_tangram() run commands inside managed environments. sn_run_infercnvpy(object = seurat_obj, ...) now provides object-level infercnvpy workflow: exports selected Seurat assay/layer gene positions, runs infercnvpy managed pixi environment, imports CNV metadata optional CNV reductions back Seurat object. Packaged Python runner scripts now live pixi family configs inst/pixi/<family>/scripts/. Object-level Seurat workflows available scArches/scPoli, CellPhoneDB, cell2location, Tangram, Squidpy, SpatialData, stLearn corresponding sn_run_*() wrappers; method-specific Python settings can supplied method_control. R CMD check namespace diagnostics tighter: optional qs/qs2 serialization packages now declared, previous ave, tail, target, mor code-analysis notes resolved. sn_run_cluster() now accepts hvg_features, user-supplied feature list validated object merged internally selected HVGs rare-aware features scaling/PCA. lets users force rare population marker genes clustering feature set global HVG selection misses . sn_sweep_cluster_resolution() now provides formal resolution-sweep interface empirically comparing candidate cluster counts across Seurat resolutions metrics silhouette width, graph connectivity, cluster purity, clustering agreement, optional ROGUE summaries. sn_list_dependencies() now reports package’s required recommended R package surface install status expected source, sn_install_dependencies() can install missing CRAN, Bioconductor, GitHub dependencies one step. sn_list_10x_paths() now scans root directory 10x Genomics outputs can return outs/ directories, filtered matrix paths, raw matrix paths, H5 files, metrics_summary.csv paths. default now returns outs/ paths result can passed directly sn_initialize_seurat_object(). Returned vectors now named inferred sample identifiers. sn_interpret_annotation() now accepts label_candidates sorted enriched datasets can constrain annotation toward expected cell-type spaces ILC1 / ILC2 / ILC3 instead relying free-text background notes. sn_interpret_annotation() now supports annotation_mode = "agentic" two-stage workflow: broad lineage/state annotation followed focused refinement ambiguous lineage-sensitive clusters. Annotation evidence now also exposes canonical_marker_snapshot table prompts can compare lineage-defining markers across clusters without relying top-ranked DE hits. ellmer path now also uses native structured output final annotation table can run tool-assisted focused-comparison step refinement pass. Annotation heuristics prompt priors now robust ILC-rich datasets: blood ILC workflows now bias KIT+ ILCP-like premature mature ILC3 calls type-3 program incomplete, mixed T/NK NK/ILC3 transitional states called explicitly, dominant hemoglobin programs can now surface erythroid contamination. sn_interpret_annotation() sn_prepare_annotation_evidence() now support marker_selection = "specific" enrichment_selection = "specific" annotation evidence can prefer cluster-restricted marker genes pathway terms generic top-ranked features. Annotation evidence now adds concise canonical lineage heuristic hints known marker programs LLM can use deterministic guardrails ILC2-like, KIT+ ILC-like, T-cell-like, B-cell-like programs clearly supported. sn_assess_qc() now summarizes overall per-sample QC status, reports current QC risk signals failed-QC fractions, doublet rates, decontamination zero-count rates, can compare filtered object pre-filter reference quantify low-quality-cell removal, doublet removal, clean-cell retention. Reports can stored object@misc$qc_assessments. sn_plot_composition() now provides composition-focused bar plot helper grouped proportions, counts, QC pass/fail summaries, similar categorical tables. sn_compare_composition() now compares sample-level composition two groups reports mean proportions, differences, log2 fold changes, optional Wilcoxon/FDR statistics per category. sn_run_milo() now provides Shennong wrapper around miloR neighborhood-level differential abundance testing two sample groups Seurat embedding. sn_list_palettes() sn_get_palette() now expose package palette registry directly, sn_list_palettes() now includes preview-oriented display output plus OkabeIto palette ggokabeito.

title: Version 0.2.0
text: Standardized public metadata-selector arguments current API names removed old compatibility aliases group, group_col, sample_col, label_col, labels_key, annotation_col, condition_col, cluster_col, reference_key, cell_type_key, cell_type_col, cell_state_col, groupby, cnv_score_groupby. Backend-local config keys may still use backend names required external Python tools. sn_run_cluster() now uses simpler rare-feature interface. supported automatic rare feature methods gini local_markers; less common local_hvg ciara modes removed clustering wrapper. Advanced thresholds consolidated rare_feature_control = list(group_max_fraction = ..., group_max_cells = ..., gene_max_fraction = ..., min_cells = ...); old scalar threshold arguments removed. sn_plot_feature() now silently replaces Seurat’s default expression color scale Shennong palette requested, avoiding noisy duplicate colour-scale message. sn_plot_feature() now exposes additional Seurat 5.5 FeaturePlot() arguments including assay, dims, cells, alpha, stroke_size, min_cutoff, raster_dpi. ggrastr available, raster = TRUE rasterizes regular ggplot point layer pt_size behaves like raster = FALSE, fixing overly large rasterized feature points. sn_plot_feature(raster = TRUE) now falls back vector point layer optional package ggrastr unavailable instead failing Seurat’s ordered rasterization. sn_plot_dim() now exposes label_halo users can disable white label halo/background, label = TRUE, repel = TRUE now keeps repel-aware label layer instead replacing fixed-position shadow text. sn_plot_dot() now uses black colorbar frame/tick styling suppresses duplicate colour-scale replacement message applying Shennong palettes. sn_list_dependencies() sn_install_dependencies() now classify anndataR tidytemplate GitHub-hosted optional dependencies Nebulosa Bioconductor dependency instead routing CRAN. Legacy .qs support now remains opportunistic qs already installed, new one-step dependency installation uses qs2 avoids attempting archived, R 4.6-incompatible qs package. sn_install_dependencies() now installs required dependencies GitHub-hosted optional packages default stops package names remain missing installer warnings, making partial installation failures easier diagnose. Reworked pkgdown article set around PBMC3k tutorial path, adding explicit data/project visualization articles rewriting workflow articles explain Shennong function used showing code. Heavy credentialed chunks now remain opt-SHENNONG_RUN_VIGNETTES=true local website builds stay fast. sn_run_cluster(normalization_method = "sctransform", batch = ...) now runs SCTransform followed Harmony integration instead rejecting SCTransform-based integration workflows. sn_run_cluster() now applies rare_feature_n per selected rare_feature_method de-duplicating combined rare-aware feature set, matching documented contract. stored object@misc$rare_feature_selection record now keeps requested rare_feature_n, resolved rare_feature_control, realized selected_rare_feature_n. sn_calculate_rogue() now avoids materializing full matrix optional subsampling, skips redundant entropy work grouped ROGUE scores requested, returns tidy per-cluster per-sample-per-cluster tables grouping metadata supplied. sn_list_palettes() now renders palette names swatches without overlap plot mode includes built-viridis-family palettes shared palette registry. sn_plot_dim(), sn_plot_feature(), sn_plot_*() wrappers now reconcile aspect_ratio panel_widths / panel_heights automatically instead erroring fixed panel sizes requested, Seurat reduction plots now apply axis hiding reliably sn_plot_dim(label = TRUE) adds white halo behind labels better legibility. sn_plot_feature() now also supports mode = "density" Nebulosa-style embedding density maps galaxy-like default theme shared colorbar collection across multi-feature plots. sn_find_doublets() now records skipped cells unresolved instead NA stored class column orders doublet classes singlet, doublet, levels. sn_initialize_seurat_object() now accepts named character vectors returned sn_list_10x_paths() imports detected 10x samples one call, returning named list Seurat objects. Annotation-aware sn_filter_genes() warnings now report example unmatched feature names, sn_plot_*() legends use safer non-negative spacing legend text overlap plotted panels. sn_initialize_seurat_object() now recognizes typical 10x Genomics outs/ directories, reads filtered matrix automatically, stores discovered source metadata raw_feature_bc_matrix paths metrics_summary.csv contents Seurat::Misc(object, "input_source"). sn_remove_ambient_contamination() now reuses stored raw path automatically selected method can use background droplets caller leaves raw = NULL. sample_name = NULL input path named 10x path, inferred sample identifier now written meta.data$sample automatically. sn_enrich() now reuses -session caches repeated MSigDB term-table loads repeated SYMBOL--ENTREZ conversions, reduces repeated overhead enrichment-heavy test analysis sessions. sn_interpret_annotation() now supports cluster-level functional evidence enrichment_name, can incorporate cluster QC summaries prompt, requests structured annotation JSON default, stores parsed cluster annotation table, can map normalized cell-type labels plus confidence/risk fields back onto Seurat metadata, now defaults ellmer-backed provider path rather Shennong-managed local provider config. also now resolves de_name automatically omitted, preferring stored default marker result, single available DE result, otherwise recent marker result. Annotation prompts now include full cluster_by evidence table instead truncating eight rows, request one record per cluster, use conservative evidence-grounded label selection, can inject candidate-label priors sorted datasets, can attach cluster-neighborhood geometry reductions UMAP. Prompt assembly now explicitly markdown-structured, keeps system/task/evidence sections easier iterate prompt templates. sn_interpret_de(), sn_interpret_enrichment(), sn_write_results(), sn_write_figure_legend(), sn_write_presentation_summary() now share step-wise progress logging elapsed-time reporting surface. LLM-provider integration now centered ellmer. old sn_configure_llm_provider(), sn_list_llm_providers(), sn_get_llm_provider(), sn_make_openai_provider(), sn_make_sub2api_provider() compatibility shims removed, along legacy ~/.shennong provider/history workflow. supported entry point now sn_make_ellmer_provider(), can explicitly forward reasoning_effort compatible GPT-5 chat-completions endpoints. Default environment-variable discovery now limited OPENAI_*; temporary SUB2API_* compatibility path removed. Annotation metadata write-back now lean default. High-level interpretation writes core fields needed visualization grouping (label, broad_label, confidence, status, risk_flags) Seurat metadata, detailed supporting markers/functions/notes stay stored interpretation result table object@misc. sn_calculate_composition() now supports multi-column group_by values, can return proportions, counts, measure, preserves factor columns source metadata, filters returned composition categories min_cells, can sort single grouping column chosen category level WT proportion. sn_initialize_project() now single project bootstrap entry point. now also writes repository .gitignore plus generated project .Rproj file initialized analysis repositories. built-Paired discrete palette now overridden Shennong brightest yellow swatch uses #ECD577 instead Brewer’s #FFFF99. Visualization helpers now share common discrete-palette resolver. Named palettes \"Paired\" expand automatically categories present base palette length, key plotting helpers now expose panel_widths / panel_heights plus consistent axis-label handling. sn_plot_dim() sn_plot_feature() now default hiding coordinate axes, choose point sizes automatically pt_size = NULL, keep shared point-size heuristic small versus large datasets. sn_plot_dot() now defaults warmer-high / cooler-low color direction, keeps Z-score legend ahead percent legend, supports Min/Max legend labels, uses hollow black-edged percent legend dots, accepts legend_position, uses thicker black colorbar ticks. Continuous-color helpers now use palette registry sn_get_palette(..., palette_type = "continuous"), expression-oriented plotting functions now apply continuous palettes shared internal resolver instead separate ad hoc scale_*_distiller() logic. sn_plot_barplot() now supports automatic summary bars repeated observations, optional SD/SE error bars, optional jittered raw points, making suitable sample-level effect summaries well simple identity bars. sn_compare_composition() now adds change factor levels Increase Decrease derived sign log2_fc. sn_find_doublets() now skips zero-count low-feature cells running scDblFinder() corrected layers, records corrected-layer results _corrected suffixes, works zero-count flags produced ambient-RNA correction. sn_filter_cells() now validates method argument, keeps constant-value QC groups MAD collapses zero, checks plotting dependencies explicitly rendering diagnostics. sn_filter_genes() now validates min_cells keeps threshold summary stable requested threshold exceeds number cells object. sn_run_cluster() now defaults hvg_group_by batch column batch integration requested user explicitly supply separate HVG grouping variable. sn_standardize_gene_symbols() now also accepts character vectors gene symbols gene IDs returns standardized vector directly, preserving existing matrix Seurat-object behavior. sn_run_cluster(normalization_method = "scran", batch = ...) now runs scran normalization selected batch-integration backend instead rejecting batch workflows. repository now ships scripts/check-prepush.R maintainers can run documentation, targeted tests, full test suite, R CMD build, R CMD check ---manual one local pre-push command. Internal DE result storage now reuses shared misc-result helper instead maintaining second collection-specific implementation. sn_check_version() sn_install_shennong() now use unified source / ref arguments GitHub local source paths; old github_repo, github_ref, local_path aliases removed.

title: Version 0.2.0
text: Fixed sn_list_10x_paths() detected samples returned deterministic sample-name order instead depending platform-specific filesystem find traversal order. Fixed sn_standardize_gene_symbols() unresolved ambiguous HGNChelper suggestions longer propagate NA row names drop otherwise valid original symbols. Truly missing empty feature names still removed duplicate symbols aggregated. Fixed IO edge cases sn_read(row_names = "column") failed column names, detected 10x spatial directories dispatched custom reader, sn_write() failed existing SingleCellExperiment h5ad exports, qs2 serialization called qs2::qs_save() wrong argument name. Fixed sn_run_celltypist() path inputs precomputed CellTypist inputs return prediction table instead trying write metadata onto character path. Fixed sn_remove_ambient_contamination(method = "soupx") Seurat returns now add nCount_<assay>_corrected nFeature_<assay>_corrected metadata SoupX-corrected layer, matching decontX writeback behavior. Fixed pkgdown reference index adding exported sn_sweep_cluster_resolution() topic. Fixed malformed hidden R chunk clustering vignette prevented pkgdown rendering articles. Fixed local CI test helpers Seurat fixtures used de_enrich utils tests longer depend implicit species inference non-returned normalization calls. Fixed pkgdown reference indexing new helpers sn_assess_qc() sn_list_10x_paths() included generated site configuration.

title: Version 0.1.2
text: Released 2026-03-25.

title: Version 0.1.2
text: Bundled human mouse GENCODE gene-annotation data added gene-level filtering workflows. snapshot now also stores genome-context fields sequence name, source, coordinates, strand, gene status/source, annotation level addition gene identifiers gene types. Small built-PBMC example assets added pbmc_small pbmc_small_raw, sampled packaged pbmc1k / pbmc3k references check-safe examples README workflows. Integration cluster-diagnostics metrics expanded sn_calculate_silhouette(), sn_calculate_graph_connectivity(), sn_calculate_pcr_batch(), sn_calculate_clustering_agreement(), sn_calculate_isolated_label_score(), sn_calculate_cluster_entropy(), sn_calculate_cluster_purity(), sn_identify_challenging_groups(), aggregate sn_assess_integration() wrapper. Rare-cell-aware clustering support added sn_detect_rare_cells() new sn_run_cluster() parameters can append rare-aware features Gini-selected genes, local HVGs, local markers, optional CIARA-derived features PCA Harmony. Bulk RNA-seq deconvolution support added sn_deconvolve_bulk(), sn_store_deconvolution(), sn_get_deconvolution_result(), covering local BayesPrism runs plus local CIBERSORTx container workflows result import. pkgdown documentation now reorganized around workflow stages rather source files alone. New end--end articles cover preprocessing QC, clustering integration, metrics diagnostics, annotation pathways, composition analysis, interpretation/reporting. sn_find_de() now supports pseudobulk differential expression limma addition DESeq2 edgeR. sn_find_de() now supports marker discovery COSGR optional GitHub package installed. sn_initialize_project() now scaffolds user analysis repositories shipped inst/codex/project-template/ assets, creating governed project layout AGENTS.md, memory/, docs/standards/, skills/, config/, data/, scripts/, notebooks/, runs/, results/. sn_initialize_project() now convenience wrapper packaged project-template initializer. sn_get_codex_skill_path() now exposes packaged Codex asset paths Codex root, package-usage skills, project template, project-template skills. sn_install_codex_skill() now installs package-usage skills, project governance skills, packaged Codex asset layout. Signature catalog helpers added: sn_list_signatures(), sn_add_signature(), sn_update_signature(), sn_delete_signature(). Stored-result discovery retrieval helpers added: sn_list_results(), sn_get_de_result(), sn_get_enrichment_result(), sn_get_interpretation_result(). interpretation layer now supports user-supplied background context dual output styles either model-facing prompt bundles human-readable summaries.

title: Version 0.1.2
text: Internal sparse-matrix workflows optimized better runtime lower peak memory use. Pseudobulk DE aggregation now groups columns without materializing dense matrices, split Seurat assay layers combined sparse triplet assembly instead repeated indexed writes, exact kNN fallbacks now use blockwise distance evaluation instead constructing full cell--cell distance matrix, gene-symbol standardization now reuses bundled annotation data plus grouped row aggregation instead external CSV reads per-column duplicate collapsing. Developer-facing informational notifications now routed internal package logging helpers instead mix ad hoc logger, message(), cli progress calls. Progress wording now consistent across initialization, clustering, enrichment, preprocessing workflows, real warning() stop() conditions retain existing semantics. sn_enrich() now uses single x input automatic dispatch across gene vectors, ranked named vectors, data frames, Seurat-stored DE results. gene_clusters formula now drives grouped ORA (gene ~ cluster) ranked GSEA (gene ~ log2fc) workflows, multi-database requests database = c("H", "GOBP", "KEGG", "C2:CP:REACTOME") supported one call. sn_enrich() now aligns MSigDB arguments msigdbr supporting collection / subcollection, still accepting collection strings database H C2:CP:REACTOME. sn_enrich() now filters returned enrichment tables raw p-value rather adjusted p-value writes one result file per requested database stable prefix / outdir naming. Dataset documentation now consolidated single R/data.R source, user-facing examples shifting simulated matrices network-backed PBMC downloads built-small PBMC package data. sn_find_de() now uses single method argument instead separate test_use pseudobulk_method parameters. sn_find_de() now uses layer consistently Seurat v5 workflows longer exposes legacy slot argument. sn_filter_genes() now supports annotation-aware filtering gene_class exact gene_type values backed bundled GENCODE snapshot human mouse. Signature registry maintenance now delegates add/update/delete operations upstream SignatuR package API instead maintaining parallel custom tree-editing implementation inside Shennong. Harmony-backed integration now targets immunogenomics/harmony harmony2 developer branch package metadata CI instead CRAN release line. Integration metrics now prefer stored Seurat neighbor graphs available otherwise fall back Annoy-based approximate kNN exact distance search, keeping default assessment path fast enough routine use. sn_get_signatures() now reads package-owned signature snapshot built full SignatuR tree development, runtime signature retrieval stable, tree-structured, longer depends installed SignatuR package version. Signature build assets now center data/shennong_signature_catalog.rda, rebuilt directly upstream SignatuR dataset development, replacing opaque R/sysdata.rda storage used earlier snapshot prototype. sn_enrich() now stores enrichment results object@misc$enrichment_results[[store_name]] Seurat object supplied, aligning enrichment existing stored DE workflow. pkgdown articles, shipped Codex skill references, NEWS.md now treated required deliverables user-facing workflow change.

title: Version 0.1.2
text: Fixed sn_install_shennong(channel = "github") longer tries resolve runtime-optional GitHub Suggests default installation. Removed optional rare-cell backends FiRE, CellSIUS, EDGE Shennong’s supported dependency surface sn_detect_rare_cells() interface. Fixed sn_plot_dot() theme handling optional catplot theme longer tries impose additional aspect ratio top coord_fixed(). Fixed Rd example line-width failures R CMD check declared runtime data.tree dependency explicitly.

title: Version 0.1.1
text: Released 2026-03-19.

title: Version 0.1.1
text: Automatic human/mouse species inference sn_get_species() using hom_genes mitochondrial naming patterns. layer-aware pkgdown article covering inferred species, non-default count layers, stored differential-expression metadata. Additional regression tests species inference, DE metadata, BPCells-backed Seurat layers.

title: Version 0.1.1
text: sn_initialize_seurat_object() now attempts species inference deciding whether compute species-specific QC metrics. sn_get_signatures() now uses package-local fallback signatures core categories needed Shennong workflows SignatuR unavailable. Stored DE results now include schema provenance metadata package version, timestamp, assay/layer context, threshold settings. sn_plot_*() helpers now treat catplot optional enhancement rather mandatory dependency.

title: Version 0.1.1
text: Fixed sn_remove_ambient_contamination() BPCells-backed Seurat layers materializing BPCells matrices passing decontX. Fixed optional dependency handling missing SignatuR longer breaks core initialization clustering paths. Fixed SoupX validation order missing raw input reported package availability issues. Fixed sn_deconvolve_bulk() example cibersortx dry-run path longer fails package examples missing credentials. Fixed GitHub Actions dependency installation check coverage jobs keep minimal, solvable dependency set instead trying install unsupported GitHub-optional backends lockfile generation.

title: Version 0.1.0
text: Released 2026-03-18.

title: Version 0.1.0
text: sn_load_data() primary example-data loader. Consolidated clustering sn_run_cluster(). unified ambient contamination interface SoupX decontX. Expanded test coverage across composition, data loading, clustering, utilities, visualization, ambient contamination. Missing help pages exported functions, CI scaffolding, richer README, updated package metadata current R syntax requirements.

title: Version 0.1.0
text: Removed old sn_load_pbmc() wrapper favor primary sn_load_data() entry point. Refreshed generated documentation package metadata part modernization effort.

title: Version 0.1.0
text: Addressed multiple modernization issues package build, test, documentation pipeline.
